subject: BREAKING: Smith & Belford Were Key in Saving Don Tracy's Job
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois
body:
Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford were the deciding votes during a Motion of No-Confidence that saved IL GOP Chair's Don Tracy’s job - at least for now.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2c34f469c7c0/breaking-smith-belford-were-key-in-saving-don-tracys-job?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford Were Key Votes in Saving Don Tracy's Job During Saturday's GOP Meeting, in Blow to the Grassroots (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-were-key-votes-in-saving-don-tracys-job-during-saturdays-gop-meeting-in-blow-to-the-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During Saturday’s Illinois Republican State Central Committee (SSC) meeting in Edwardsville, Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford were the deciding votes, during a Motion of No-Confidence, that saved Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy’s job – at least for now, in a blow to the grassroots movement that’s sweeping across the state.
IL GOP chairman Don Tracy and Richard Irvin. (Photo credit: Illinois Review)
The meeting, which was held at the Holiday Inn & Suites, was set up by Tracy to deliberately silence the voices of the grassroots during the public comment section of the meeting by limiting the number of conservative activists who could speak.

In an email obtained by Illinois Review, Tracy’s executive director and top aide sent out an email to SSC members with the following message, copying Tracy:

“For public comments, it will be invitation only at the direction of SCC members. SCC members are allowed to invite one speaker. Public commentators must register with me by 6PM the day before the meeting – Friday, May 12, 2023.”

But sources confirmed to Illinois Review that once Tracy noticed that very few of the grassroots had showed up to the meeting today – a 5-hour drive from Chicago – he changed the rules to allow anyone to speak for two minutes.

During the
December SSC meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the 200-plus grassroots activists who attended were only given 90-seconds to speak during public comments – and many drove hours just for their voices to be heard. But if you were a friend and ally of Tracy, you could speak beyond the allotted time.

After the brief public comment section of the meeting concluded, a motion was made for the SSC to go into executive session – meaning the rest of the meeting would be done in secret and out of public view, to discuss the embattled IL GOP chair’s future – a move that frustrated the grassroots activists in attendance today.

Once in executive session, a Motion of No-Confidence was made, and votes were taken.

And sources confirm to Illinois Review that SSC members Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford were the deciding votes that secured Tracy’s job as chairman, at least for now – voting that they had “confidence” in his leadership in a direct blow to the grassroots constituency that they represent.

Smith represents the 14th Congressional District on the SSC – and he’s also, coincidentally, the chairman of Tracy’s newly-created Grassroots Committee, whose purpose is to “Actively listen to grassroots leaders and groups, identify ways to communicate with them in an ongoing manner, and jointly develop ways to work together to win elections.”

Smith is also a founder of
YANA (https://www.lasallecountyrepublicans.org/events/yana-you-are-not-alone-wxcek?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (You Are Not Alone), a local grassroots organization that gives a voice to every day concerned citizens. A voice to the voiceless.

And Tracy finds organizations like YANA abhorrent and detestable – his record and rhetoric as chairman proves it.

Belford represents the 12th Congressional District on the SSC, and she serves on Tracy’s newly-created
Endorsement Policy Committee (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which Tracy will chair – paving the way for the chairman and the state party to officially endorse their preferred candidates in primary elections, in an apparent dig at the grassroots-base of the party.

In January, Tracy floated this idea during an interview with
Bishop on Air (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6DHuWDOgrI&t=4s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and blamed the top of the ticket for the midterm election losses this past November – saying that the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward.

The move, done in secret, sets the stage for Tracy and his committee to officially support candidates like IL GOP-favored candidate for governor Richard Irvin, the mayor of Aurora, who lost the primary election in June by a shocking 43 points, despite $50 million coming in from billionaire Ken Griffin to prop up the mayor’s failed gubernatorial campaign.

Irvin also received the support and endorsements from many senior IL GOP officials, including nearly half of the then-SSC – whose members serve as the governing board of the IL GOP.

Make no mistake – Don Tracy despises the grassroots – and he views the conservative base of the party as “steerage” or third-class citizens, to borrow an analogy from the blockbuster hit movie, the Titanic.

And it’s why he’s created this new endorsement committee – which Belford is a member of, to officially support the candidates that he wants to support and who oppose the grassroot candidates.

By voting that they have confidence in Don Tracy’s leadership means that Smith and Beflord support the IL GOP mailing out a
pro-choice mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in support of their preferred candidate for DuPage County board chair – a direct violation of the Republican Party of Illinois Platform, and paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois.

By voting that they have confidence in Don Tracy’s leadership means that Smith and Beflord support the IL GOP mailing out
vicious mailers (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that unfairly attacked grassroots candidates – even mailing pieces with photoshopped pictures of grassroot candidates alongside Gov. JB Pritzker to deliberately deceive Republican primary voters into thinking that these “so-called” Republicans are personal friends with the Democratic governor.

“He’s not a Republican. He’s not one of us,” was a popular tagline in hit pieces that Tracy’s allies used to target grassroots candidates – paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois.

By voting that they have confidence in Don Tracy’s leadership means that Smith and Beflord support a man who ran in the Illinois primary for the 50th State Senate District as a
Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and whose family-owned business, Dot Foods – where he is an owner, donated (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden.

And revelations uncovered by Illinois Review show that on September 4, 2020 – just months before his election as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois, Tracy made a
personal donation (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-silent-abandons-republican-school-board-candidates-while-il-democratic-party-funds-school-board-races-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Citizens for Judge Emily Sutton – a Democrat running for Circuit Court Judge in the 9th Judicial Circuit.

Just prior to Tracy’s donation, Sutton received a boost from two influential Illinois Democrats – US Sen. Dick Durbin, D-IL and US Rep. Cheri Bustos, D-IL, who at the time, was chair of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee and a close ally of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi.

And during the 2022 Illinois governor’s primary, several Republican state party officials under Tracy’s leadership endorsed Irvin’s campaign, despite Irvin pulling
Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2014, 2016 and 2020.

Irvin also spent years
praising (https://twitter.com/demgovs/status/1483091889607909379?s=61&t=PRMWA5ZjyteefflEsOtYwQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker – referring to him as a “great friend and a great leader.”

And in 2020, Irvin attended a Black Lives Matter rally, yelling,
“I can’t breathe!” (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QOyFraLPPLo&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

But don’t worry about it – Smith and Belford have great confidence in Tracy’s leadership – and despite his disdain for the grassroots and his support of Democrats – they want to see him continue in his role as chairman of the Illinois Republican Party.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=821cb80d1e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_14_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-821cb80d1e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

subject: — MY STATEMENT —

body:

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb0h6h64usb1to315670350prqpfah5k1rqg8ns8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1cph2bs)
---
Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm5r7lqm1hejuqoo5sh5u3d4t9ceh3f6flt7pgmg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1cph2bs)**
_(But if you are doing poorly right now, please don 't even think about donating. Take care of yourself right now!)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsr2qrkb8gbdg8kn8aioj6c6quekojnotmn7gq20_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zffg7b15orr8m6vu80hme56n2sbo5laharmdo648_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zra9af3hrarqhdq0jbhp6us2pfskm2a0br011jjo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5ojficq148gpm5nglhh0ktglm82jjogtgte2di8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob1c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs4u636ra8nibllmpeqqem8ehj4kugd8i4s28i48_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaqdgceljmb83k2es46jv2qohqour7f6bc34hno8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp4c8jrn8kflq4699ps4jhvo84idvj5h81qpkbh8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhmm3bapp6gv7o4qpgjrka55fi7re7475jkqo60o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z426j9tltn7pj1dh4s285qclnb2svtb3j9vh1vng_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2pgupjv5i334tiujek21mlf64u55on5qet664j0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbu4d4em3gfisailkslgrj53hb35qb8aspdgcq90_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zni8ld3u2a1s7iacqpb6uq6pes4vv0egsvo81ulo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z01s09n4arrs0agi18388d92m6ibir6df33262a0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq7fv8oi3qm91c36shld6t9trunjpv2lvpoctqu0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmp39b8sboiknhf4sin5q1f1meq84h4dsdvjra4g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq6adbm1kb8gulpkfnvigi7h8e601e99dn9t7ao0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqq3iu5gdirfij0ju867oo66lsaiehv6im6kf2vg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcbsgoh1p972er6a16g7m3qhon1b49c9bt5e62fg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8uc8tu974465ai6pd4nefp0e67apb96750r8n20_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zko137lfdk02qvv2016s7dhdsb6nbpup9dnd9ed0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl8t6ffplldobbsbo09v7p6g1415og0rnbd3p71g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlpohufjep12mgonntshqbost0p6ck5205pr9vtg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
As Speaker of the House, I need to know.

| |
---
| | | Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmacq2vju68hmac9a3bv7rdc94q0tks0ah7ff00_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3c1h2bs)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4rpfmi8tsjdadarqdpbarlpdi61pgmmgo84m8eg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3c1h2bs)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zef4ps7aqs6dvt3o90oco7b177nubrmuorufgr9o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3c1h2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN'S AMNESTY PLAN](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znbp418737cs7m1lr7nar6ojrer6tb4iina0hloo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1im1ob3c1h2bs)

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

Fellow Conservative, This is urgent. I am asking for help. **The left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to try to take me down. ** It's only been a few days since far-left Dem Colin Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But the massive Democrat fundraising machine is already churning out millions. **_There is a massive wave of cash flooding into his campaign in the 36 hours since he's announced. He's raised over $2 million in a day and a half. That is indicative of the tidal wave of cash that is going to come in- and we 're just getting started._** The message is clear - Democrat donors are hellbent on **flipping Texas** **Blue** next year, and they'll spend whatever it takes to make it happen. **Please send an emergency donation today to help me FIGHT BACK and Keep Texas Red!**

The corporate, mainstream media is already running cover for Allred. They're describing him with words like "moderate," "bipartisan," and "middle-of-the-road." **But here is the truth:** Look, if you're a leftist in Manhattan, San Francisco or Chicago, you're giving money to this guy, they all are...

**Why? Because Allred is a hardcore Democrat who voted with Pelosi 100% of the time.** _He voted for 87,000 new IRS agents to audit middle-income Americans._ _He voted for Biden 's assault on the U.S. oil and gas industry._ _He repeatedly voted for open borders._ Colin Allred is too extreme for Texas, and I _need_ your support _RIGHT NOW_ to stop him. name: American Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666245%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SZ6%2flfQ2wZPINUCYahA57A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666246%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MDyfDLvkTJtSsb9yt21G2g&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666247%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=amT5k8KsbBgyU4rOhr5UOQ&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666248%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ehCOr6l9MzHkZVkns6PkYg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-WpGcDAN

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-WpGcDAN

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders? I’ll tell you. **We’d live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with – all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney’s incompetency. We’re fighting back with a massive new lawsuit – but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I’m asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoemasp8edkrp3oco5bufb8ilaik7pj00160ssno_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmco74cth2bs) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother’s murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao’s right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao’s motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion – she’s now a U.S. Attorney! **That’s why we’re stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao’s freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can’t win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmmhbntn57h58hft18h1hvpdm9o2grjpjqrqs10_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmco74cth2bs) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That’s the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we’re going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrfqntsdgjhihuf0c048erd9m0ho0lsspc8edf20_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmco74cth2bs) Please don’t hesitate – the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs4g0poter84eu42d8551m6d4hnrsf773bfcf4q0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmco74cth2bs)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/gObfiLaoDayP1oBFFe9G1w)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/WX_JTt2nifLetQvWYQyIOw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/l_L2zcV9wOSJ-A_sPugfAA)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/HwppLHOFSOipsixbBbOSxg)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/U28QbFnypCgVl01mcNJGAQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/xmH6hlU-qAdVnCqinxKkCg)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/GOvw2sHkI1T-AOI8Qphrhw) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/XLqot3l7O83UiuORNllRIQ)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/EKePTMMobTZGEMNU8NX7nQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg5NTQifQ/MHwd38BpJ5eamvuz0DMoFQ)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM0LTk1ODE5MTY3YjMzNzRkNmNiODc3OTJkOGU4NjFiYjE4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/RBV0wi0VUMSrfzTBBfOwGA) to unsubscribe.
---

As I've always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters' contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! _
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - _no matter the amount of your gift_ - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don't have to worry about a thing, Friend. I'll take care of it all:

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkl9aa025gbs4iss6g7l2ti4vesfpbmmp12b1u8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmaor1c5h2bs) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagd3e4hi9l9p5cf1ok71shgi9nmpbparcnvv7bg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmaor1c5h2bs) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6u7ij6vg4e7c8aoo6sjt0acpapsmudjjti4qdg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmaor1c5h2bs) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5oit3fkpu751po72n4r6h4afh8st3ij7l7vqevg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmaor1c5h2bs)
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2qfq52f2ol42j1rk64jd8n3tu071rfp3naafl9o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hmaor1c5h2bs)
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666244%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h6S2qqQhQjSBl6f3gTXIVQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666355%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5hIJbrIgZO4VFfENcHUFIw&sysid=1)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666356%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vtb5CDTkNqkkexBtZnhvcw&sysid=1)** It’s a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666357%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6thsvDuInpY9nV5vWHf9A&sysid=1)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666358%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7RCmao32bhWVIiRuOa8tFw&sysid=1)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666359%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKfI4y%2bDc1mAfP9VTMJGAw&sysid=1)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666350%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UJheO5EPxWHIDrIpt2nyRg&sysid=1)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today»](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666351%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CHHmCZ9tYbBzN5Dgtd1zgw&sysid=1)**
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Update

name: American Action News
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidqpbicoobouqq03ut061i2bit8rvsuutn5j1o0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hm9oj1clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqgrgpik6709qi3n5p2r02etr9ma0blio2c9uvo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hm9oj1clh2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zruu8mjn6qmtgik05p4cj5d6kjub1qvq1e7tn2fg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c1hm9oj1clh2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: This June 20th primary could decide whether or not Glenn Youngkin has the votes to ban abortion in Virginia next year.
body:
Abortion at risk in Virginia
| | | | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7703cf3-58da-4dd5-8d1e-ef1bb56157c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **[June 20th may determine if abortion remains legal in Virginia](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta074ae61-8581-42cf-bf14-d70ca35bfa32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**_ **Democrats control the VA State Senate by 2 votes, while Republicans have the governor & state house. Yet, it gets worse.** _**_One of the 2 Democrats, Joe Morrissey, has a history of sordid behavior and says he's a "pro-life" Democrat._ ** **_Morissey was *twice* disbarred as state prosecutor for fistfights and contempt of court citations. He was charged with "delinquency of a minor" for having a relationship with, and marrying, a 17-yr old law firm receptionist._** _Add in his will to control all women's bodies, and it's not surprising this happened:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7d939fe-7976-4b62-8f6b-e430897b5944/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats._ **_Yet, we can remove a morally bankrupt anti-choicer and replace him with former Delegate Lashrecse Aird. __Aird has made Abortion rights the centerpiece of their campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** [_The primary's June 20th, but early voting has begun! If we want another crucial pro-choice vote from a Democratic district, _we must help Aird NOW_ , or risk Glenn Youngkin banning abortion next year. _**_Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64d23ec0-c6f7-4b37-8767-4f37f058dff5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must remove anti-abortion extremists, even when they dress up as Democrats. _ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80e8632a947a4c18b96db87cb3836599&_e=-HtQaOPXbd4kJE3Y3WDakaVU62CC3DqtqQCxTzHHkdwriF6l-3SphoWE_JTKHAqBBpmk2b91mO3bHPioYhAa6Tb2P2XvUgeMNFXsE_R7upx5TWVqcfRhm2FYpmb_IXbiVadnQhthWIHQWM4LqtAJTtpeXu4QPEcq50uOoYD1BtOIsBT4C3Smjz3TDhXgp9Hh0DvhZFRQ9u5c48QYdvHR-oRrmKfcw05nE-J0csijYgJXQtW6_rGkCY6OPOOkaWkSwuflUzCW57kL4D4UWpC14jcHJnLFNm26dWwcxAzcJQV6sHulKgC_afC0ihkGEhvmX_GmZmVzptErrhiGdHEL03S1PwFeB5tTf2zUp0jxBzLLDzaw8W_6pSpreGjz5Z0s_XL5NeY7J9n89Rx12umQYw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80e8632a947a4c18b96db87cb3836599&_e=-HtQaOPXbd4kJE3Y3WDakaVU62CC3DqtqQCxTzHHkdwriF6l-3SphoWE_JTKHAqBBpmk2b91mO3bHPioYhAa6Tb2P2XvUgeMNFXsE_R7upx5TWVqcfRhm2FYpmb_IXbiVadnQhthWIHQWM4LqtAJTtpeXu4QPEcq50uOoYD1BtOIsBT4C3Smjz3TDhXgp9Hh0DvhZFRQ9u5c48QYdvHR-oRrmKfcw05nE-J0csijYgJXQtW6_rGkCY6OPOOkaWkSAplJiLCN7Q9dc2-8_s-Jat3z4m6pELcXyQOOiGInM321KnycXLFF2-OQjdolBsLW8bSyG7BCwvMXPAZaiLpC5uaBL9LVrvL3tDaWLJiEnWbuo9Ux2oJjbqk909bkfVJCIOawnFKvr7ORTYSiaWnIRg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80e8632a947a4c18b96db87cb3836599&_e=-HtQaOPXbd4kJE3Y3WDakaVU62CC3DqtqQCxTzHHkdwriF6l-3SphoWE_JTKHAqBBpmk2b91mO3bHPioYhAa6Tb2P2XvUgeMNFXsE_R7upx5TWVqcfRhm2FYpmb_IXbiVadnQhthWIHQWM4LqtAJTtpeXu4QPEcq50uOoYD1BtOIsBT4C3Smjz3TDhXgp9Hh0DvhZFRQ9u5c48QYdvHR-oRrmKfcw05nE-J0csijYgJXQtW6_rGkCY6OPOOkaWkSaG62rnidQkHr9uzEnGpwnTbXEBbbyS0rFDV8hWZZ1qWxYa8eWpYNPh2A7Fer6wF-9XDbgjVmwZXkoK89dmH2M-yX-7oYJAF1ihU7etDIkqIYfdu9HXE_DCYNHDtc9vFD8NPZMnASYd6vtlf2gqOdLA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Help equip young Americans to be future conservative leaders of our nation
body:
Are you encouraged by the direction our country is heading?

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f638cd2fdf634742b997eed780498cae&_e=9XZdogJ13gNgSXOc0MYIK96yiSbe-8HoIyE73J28pBFo_eUKbk8CNap7uf_RQ4Z7Aki2qVJbyppuZbIlEW7Ji5it_-DcBzzYz6HFr__3p6usaDu0laxeJrRcyZCYP2nwP8wQ9EYDytmdwJ7E8d5IP5W8GVMvr-ZpiG45ZgzovWUkRorhSXcIro0h7_3lbuYH9Oyk737wwlnI6u9HuNqoaqxs2JUZhOOBS-ElcBe-ocvCqmbrJ6P7ce2_HCqbHFNgWldjh3esBY0tVkwXybIC_BrcCu0anoY1v5cddyflkC29tCQpwFcWED6GM0a-K1fSRclXb1pM0-10tGskJJOyJAzE28DsgzinRvhTFB_5ILMS288j7yPlLinnoHnsGU6R)
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f638cd2fdf634742b997eed780498cae&_e=9XZdogJ13gNgSXOc0MYIK96yiSbe-8HoIyE73J28pBFo_eUKbk8CNap7uf_RQ4Z7Aki2qVJbyppuZbIlEW7Ji47Ab3uP3yLc6pzXeGiNdcf-xHME-XcfCX13MM_Ocuxj14xvTnIawE1csnfq8Ddt4sklI-a3dL0AxQN59SMFqwv7gUhaTaXB61LQNfPe5o93QMguRFcfhK-hTu5WjFAcZwKUqfvZwxkq6z1J8DDXNgdnVcC_6GveMPB4-XmnTAKvQi3eVB5JzM-DbeTk3NNseulAhDapatlQn0FWUEE0gOn_vZhIyE_9BJGdo533dCnSwn5A8qDKXsK4cA8qom-96ZkZcZUPJgIElkSeY4ZU0I224rzyPyZ-h5COOsNyj5dv) Fellow American,

Are you encouraged by the direction our country is heading?

Do you feel confident that America will still be a beacon of hope and freedom by the time your kids and grandkids build families of their own?

It wouldn't surprise me if your answer to both of these questions is "no." That's why I'm emailing you today.

Given the recent progressive trends we've seen throughout America, a clear disconnect has emerged between our youth and our nation's founding principles.

I see America slipping--placing less value on the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life. I see a young America that's been taught to doubt our remarkable history and invalidate those who laid the groundwork for our nation to be the freest and most prosperous on earth. I see a nation that is more divided than ever.

But with these concerns comes a tremendous opportunity to restore America's founding principles through education, outreach, and collaboration efforts. That's exactly what ACI's new Executive Branch for America program is built to accomplish.

This program will utilize each of these facets by:

* Educating students and young professionals on the inner workings of the government--equipping them with the knowledge and tools needed to have successful careers in public service.
* Collaborating with experienced and influential government figures--like Dr. Ben Carson, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders, and former Director of the National Economic Council Larry Kudlow--to deliver lessons directly to program participants.
* Expanding the program to students and young Americans nationwide through social media platforms, online promotion, and direct visits from Dr. Carson to our nation's universities to promote the program.

But in order to get the Executive Branch for America certification program off the ground and thriving, we need your help.

Will you support these critical efforts by making a gift using the secure link below?

[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/eba](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f638cd2fdf634742b997eed780498cae&_e=9XZdogJ13gNgSXOc0MYIK96yiSbe-8HoIyE73J28pBFo_eUKbk8CNap7uf_RQ4Z7Aki2qVJbyppuZbIlEW7Ji5it_-DcBzzYz6HFr__3p6usaDu0laxeJrRcyZCYP2nwP8wQ9EYDytmdwJ7E8d5IP5W8GVMvr-ZpiG45ZgzovWUkRorhSXcIro0h7_3lbuYH9Oyk737wwlnI6u9HuNqoaqxs2JUZhOOBS-ElcBe-ocs-wusSggK4YaZuT_rovfe8vaPU1sDVnUrmH1EYXk3PCRhfRrLSiqikgPRYYjTIDPA4052qLyNcrt2Qu-7MyFOVhBj0si21Fhda5RCohc7fKHdhHk8-Awhj3HYiecut7EzMfcttOCQhTJyXcWpGdWrW)

This program will forge capable leaders that value America's founding principles and that fight to protect the democracy that our Founders committed their lives to. It's exactly what we need to change the outlook of our country today--and in the future.

But none of this work is possible without your support. So, please click this secure link to make your gift right now.

By doing so, you will equip young Americans to be the future conservative leaders of our nation. And you will help pave the way to a better America for your children and your children's children.

Thank you so much,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
