name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkA3Oz796CH-hPYBoSxXuOpwcPxwjlGnhgnw328wS2BiqDQYRaC108Bb9HEB5aE0o8snbyg-XHev0RlsbgzGnkr_lwU_SDnvfZlkVM1dxag4RUmL7BXYj3UulNDRpneomWxKHXXyVqEckIyM0dHpqZtE%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkOk-3KmfAxHw6SPZfMgplDwXF58UMOeidwC9uC_Q7Hgjxgw_XUJnnoIgu5ZpY1WMZQB1Wbkb5mfkNFYoFyNwwKB4OaiBl1yVSfpU1E_eKet_GglHjEWB7UjcGd6GZPOPs7BeXvbcvuow_P6HeMeUq5Y%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkG131UQawM_hUUoAJSa_TeCMBqY372eXFgkaw31yyaGxkuk1L9DyCYLjKm0hFIXpF-4GDanaFg8qEjEA4OMIGoRFASzY3zW7AmhRAj0XXfgERittWkH6mlIrmYI1UR33JiObX4NDD-RkDk62EoqVS5o%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkOMpAh9umNVfcs_LzbURJ0btEZ4XjmQX7qVtfKNMuah084gRKstWXFDZkkMFtA3tvwLF_i-9RpcTHFG9kIHm8p5-3hyzzDQMzucEw-8FRxGc2ffIAYN6Mse8SY0BxfjIbZAeFMYzeYpWqtC4pKLcHDw%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkLZVowMdieiiMu0PppzI3Chd5qMjoePgLENGtcS6r4MAmsxQC0BmCktUS4LG3zyatjcqmlguo7np21iXH3ulUVJG_myt-X-SmGbb1iDJQvQX-WuXIUVP7P0xAX5-zJDmfl4cyvm53VqueIX7JMeqoUM%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkBmDCneiY2GWd8vdZQ_vXfaQiVEENWN8JRl1xZakVBbS4BP86w_S6qrHp9YImnee12W9zHPKRwH4ofdofhQRUP2gyU7z_IHNDDaxHH3XpRUdPc3Ar7XIgLO_tuN6bD7KZERLOBzDWBOEp0_MP_iGmIM%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkGCSXTO4gtodx9agENPVW9eF90Lrsah2XaDUr5UZLnCvh32YJkvBlIYA759C03UWyv9C0yjlIbXAOm9QC2VYvXkbZPgWN8xRNxKaq8m-tgo18UmqCP9-0u_sJlQA8HcfZohzFfS4cffOQq1TmgqvsAU%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38d6a1cba772443b80b369ff71c962e5&_e=7xpLrD_XWCromhGJpAIhHXLmBQ1SnZA1MyTdd-AkRhqSUF5c5TZTrBoFhdAlSOO9kuj4R4jg7bZj1qRwIL9j6wq9HDExu3p5P0GrnYyX51h10jarS2sEc_MXJZMVOzFQe4F6e3cZ8RJ2hIPj4pDMkL1WqVGE1jwJS2mDXz-cIN6sNamOOZwro7Q4yYFezJdObsD9BvkuuC8GX17kAq2r3ic7Tfeddig6fxCQWLlLEpRgI0l3FhuC_QkuCYK70VR3iNrSsvuROj9BMumtrduM3uBO8I0VytN6xFGWzKDNYEw%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. name: Elizabeth Warren

body:
These fights are to honor my mother and mothers everywhere. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63271197/406201772/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13U_MOT_20230514_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTdmNTNkOC01ZmYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yHwy0TbNO-K5tYyX37fu4ZrXePBL2558CHjkhxg8rB8=&emci=e07f53d8-5ff2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e97f53d8-5ff2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I hope you’re having a good Mother’s Day, and if this holiday hits you hard, my heart goes out to you. I’m thinking about my mother today, and I’m thinking about a time when she dug deep to take care of our family. After my daddy had a heart attack, he couldn’t work for a while. Bills piled up. We lost our family station wagon. It looked like the house would be next to go. At night, I’d overhear my parents talk, and that's when I learned words like “mortgage” and “foreclosure.” One day, I walked into my parents’ bedroom. My mother’s face was red and puffy. A dress was laid out over the bedspread — the dress that only came out for weddings, graduations, and funerals. "We are not going to lose this house,” she kept saying. “We are not going to lose this house.” She’d never worked outside the home. She was terrified. But she knew what she had to do. She put on that dress, she walked down the street to Sears, and she got a minimum wage job that saved our house and saved our family. This Mother’s Day, I’m remembering her courage. I’m thinking about all the mamas fighting for their families. And I’m thinking about all the ways the deck is stacked against them: Today, a minimum wage job won’t keep a mama and her baby out of poverty. That is wrong, and that is why I am fighting to raise the minimum wage and put more power in the hands of working moms and working people everywhere — which includes strengthening unions. Most women who get abortions are already mothers. Many are working multiple jobs that don’t pay enough to support their children. Abortion bans make it even harder for those families to make ends meet. That is why I will forever be madder than hell that reproductive rights — and freedom to decide when and if to raise a family — have been ripped away, and why I’m fighting for the right to an abortion for anyone who needs or wants one. Without quality, affordable child care, mothers have been shoved out of the workforce, especially in the pandemic. They will feel the consequences — in lost earnings, in lower Social Security benefits — for the rest of their lives. That is why I am fighting for universal child care in our country. I’m going to keep up those fights, and more, like paid family leave, to honor my mother and mothers everywhere. And, look: I’m sure that social media right now is chock-full of Republican politicians waxing poetic about how much they love mothers. But I don’t want to see any tributes from them today unless they’re actually going to do something — anything — to improve the lives of mothers tomorrow. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement to make real change — to put our government on the side of mothers and families. body:
An ode to all the "mothers" in my life - Bob Lorinser | My mother worked as a nurse and raised six children by herself, with every
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/09OWPjsAp/c?w=1ioBF-N38Zs_jecSMe3ifXo7PpioE20fGtUDBM5gwjA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby8wOU9XUGpzQXA_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Today is a special day to celebrate all mothers and their undying devotion to their children. Allow me to honor the motherly figures throughout my life.
---
| | An ode to all the "mothers" in my life - Bob Lorinser
---
| |
---
| | My mother worked as a nurse and raised six children by herself, with every odd stacked against her. She did it in the best way she knew how. At times, we relied on government assistance, but, like so many middle-class fighters, with pure grit, she kept food on the table and love in our home. Barb Lorinser was softened at the edges but tempered with a spine of steel.
---
| |
---
| | Happy Mothers Day to all, especially the resilient, tenacious, strong women in the rural heartland, where unconditional love continues to mold the American Dream.
* The Mother of My Children, Peggy, cares for and loves our three children. A mother's love is incomparable, and I'm so grateful you led us all. You're the strongest woman I know.
* My Grandmother Hilda's warm hugs lightened my days, and I carried her contagious smiles growing up.
* My Grandmother-in-law Mary saw something special about me that I would never forget.
* My Mother-in-law Kay gave me my lifetime friend, partner, and wife, Peggy Sue. Sharing was hard for her, but she would be elated to see us now.
* The Mothers of my Grandchildren, Amy and Rachel, for giving us the joys of our lives. You were both born to care for others.
* My daughter-in-law, Macie, for allowing Peggy to be your mother-in-law. I am so delighted you joined our family.
* My granddaughters, I will celebrate you forever, whether you have children or not. I know you will fulfill that role for whoever deserves your unconditional love. Compassion and care run in your genes.

Let's honor mothers and maternal figures for undertaking the most difficult, most important job on Earth. Mothers are teachers, comforters, disciplinarians, managers, household nurses, financial controllers, breadwinners, and so much more. To all mothers — past, present, and future — thank you. Today we commemorate the ultimate source of unconditional love, care, dedication, and strength. Happy Mothers' Day.

name: jonathan@reissforussenate.us
subject: Help Me Stop Adam Schiff
body:
Hello, it is Jonathan Reiss here. Hope you are well!
I’d like to ask you a question.
**Can you imagine Adam Schiff in the U.S. Senate?**
Frankly, the thought of it is more than just appalling ... _but it could happen!_
The 2024 election will be the most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff, and Democrats have set our country into a tailspin. They have created an emergency situation on every issue that matters to us and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.
So, I have made the decision to run for the U.S. Senate. I will not stand on the sidelines and simply hand the U.S. Senate seat to Adam Schiff, and I hope you will not either. I need your immediate help to stop the Adam Schiff coronation.
Why do I need your help **_now?_** Believe it or not the primary election is March 5, 2024. We will decide who to send to the United States Senate in 9 months! My campaign is launching immediately, and we need the help of friends and supporters like you **today!**
**I write to ask you for your financial support today. The campaign is in serious need of funds for a successful launch, and I am turning to you for your help at this crucial time. It is essential to not stand on the sidelines and allow Adam Schiff to become our Senator.**
My contribution link is [**Donate Today!**](https://secure.winred.com/reiss-for-us-senate/donate-today) I hope you are in a position to make an immediate contribution. A contribution of any amount is greatly appreciated. Please remember the maximum contribution is limited to $3,300.00 per person.
Every dollar is urgently needed. I cannot overstate the importance of this immediate fundraising success. If you can contribute $25 or up to $3,300 we need you to do so **today! **Every single contribution, regardless of the amount, helps and is critically important.** Please join my team and let’s stop Adam Schiff!**
Thank you for your support. Please use this link to make your secure donation online and **[Donate Today!](https://secure.winred.com/reiss-for-us-senate/donate-today) **
Sincerely,
Jonathan Reiss
Republican for United States Senate
**Email: **[info@reissforussenate.us](mailto:info@reissforussenate.us)
**Website: **[**www.reissforussenate.us**](http://www.reissforussenate.us/)

**Telephone: **760-799-4370
**Mailing Address:
** Reiss for US Senate
P.O. Box 11464

Palm Desert, CA 92255

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc1de7b7a72b48cbab1ed68a933caa46&_e=vPeKaAoXhBRPaP0Mdu1A3ASLrZNJl0iuAURCKOAaCaWyrQK7DWD6ruxMBJ9U1ulcOgU27Qo0Cubd7aNfF9CadCIF9iegjOSkztPFSFyGb41PZ-GcFUWdowu6dPDJethFvkoK1Y73TrXmj8ApPKuTfOAhooHm54wrt9667Q2Y3y_6zJMVmZaZFyWRz5AxdlKBE0WS54arnr00nKAnHDm7ZTS9fQecFMSGYXLm2swt7nD7oVaMD-37uDrLkh9ewLam-pNe4s_UEO71hWTppgO-kheP-72V0PIWgy9YUlOtDjZ92z0YAyNfvrM3nnoHOnIanAxy0KDtYs0_ZzxYwpF9YeNA0irqXu7pEb7aYNvm0qFhZ6tFlobsQQeKoxGMBCL3DI-6HBsYwwZF3UB-tuAjIQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc1de7b7a72b48cbab1ed68a933caa46&_e=vPeKaAoXhBRPaP0Mdu1A3ASLrZNJl0iuAURCKOAaCaWyrQK7DWD6ruxMBJ9U1ulcOgU27Qo0Cubd7aNfF9CadCIF9iegjOSkztPFSFyGb41PZ-GcFUWdowu6dPDJethFvkoK1Y73TrXmj8ApPKuTfOAhooHm54wrt9667Q2Y3y_6zJMVmZaZFyWRz5AxdlKBE0WS54arnr00nKAnHDm7ZTS9fQecFMSGYXLm2swt7nD7oVaMD-37uDrLkh9ewLamz-7oVbxwxZS4NTwAhmexDvupCiH39uT5Gu7MKKCPTmUx0vgk-aMRDDrJIY4HoF43GSBDAwzkO9kTUU4mDRCwaIjkFgQu3FPb6yjrCr493XrBCqZD4toR9ak5M_h_aMlOb2FnMBpxE8U5g0FnlLSDnA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc1de7b7a72b48cbab1ed68a933caa46&_e=vPeKaAoXhBRPaP0Mdu1A3ASLrZNJl0iuAURCKOAaCaWyrQK7DWD6ruxMBJ9U1ulcOgU27Qo0Cubd7aNfF9CadCIF9iegjOSkztPFSFyGb41PZ-GcFUWdowu6dPDJethFvkoK1Y73TrXmj8ApPKuTfOAhooHm54wrt9667Q2Y3y_6zJMVmZaZFyWRz5AxdlKBE0WS54arnr00nKAnHDm7ZTS9fQecFMSGYXLm2swt7nD7oVaMD-37uDrLkh9ewLamrLRyRwr6Y_a0TdfW_lFhjKObSPaG6YpSndzzHI20lhzu7CShbs4XjDEYixFBpf_DnFVjqe-i65ZLezLqze41Z0ZSoDRkNWoK2t2GsV0te-k1iM5HBBfhO7rllXQOYKHudQI9zgr2WV-GPAbxVWmmxA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=dc1de7b7a72b48cbab1ed68a933caa46&_t=9pxuBHV1gvFZO2EHX4RTB6JKu0ZY6Zl9zvAbLGHYD7Gak2N9NRjIjqZZHuvy1eNRAa9Duypq9EwN-TtS2sSpjbFaMRG2nViU8TQz_AQ_5GA%3D)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWwFlwcD5N

What strange times we live in.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWwFlwcD5N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61797171:WwFlwcD5N:m:3:2532013465:58A7C508CA9A32CB4E5B0D2F4703B3B1:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61797171:WwFlwcD5N:m:3:2532013465:58A7C508CA9A32CB4E5B0D2F4703B3B1:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34cec4bd7adc4962b91bead3a421fadd&_e=DWgiBalEV9tOwbQWIXyIOTRODHDE7Qzr8S2fdAoP3SOwcgn_UTjva7OYosMmulddjc1OJmio0MrIgvw6cuUrIbr6Y57O2pGcTlJftWe5jhaikgADklC6Xch7Dp-TJvokSI2Jby4aGITThjB1IYmc4Ez-7LiAe2l8w-Dek9prq1ZGXizjJj2Aj6vdGcvrArx7EEYK-OekOutqtAqu2RkIbU2YplqPmuNh74B0hwFKSIqj3JJFxbRX59RlK0ygDNP1__UQ3-0BcBtwuDxsAJzJeProZKXrptxq9aHbKYo6RduVb26M-ro48kbgu2rIE0QQXo-OuF09Wa0VmGfQycyPK4Lp8lakzipNbV661il3MBaiXRnsb3Tjy8T_N8tUXZ3EwVniT-h1cGB60_9VjIxfcxRjmc0TdyyD9p6A_r7yFOA%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34cec4bd7adc4962b91bead3a421fadd&_e=DWgiBalEV9tOwbQWIXyIOTRODHDE7Qzr8S2fdAoP3SOwcgn_UTjva7OYosMmulddjc1OJmio0MrIgvw6cuUrIbr6Y57O2pGcTlJftWe5jhaikgADklC6Xch7Dp-TJvokSI2Jby4aGITThjB1IYmc4Ez-7LiAe2l8w-Dek9prq1ZGXizjJj2Aj6vdGcvrArx7EEYK-OekOutqtAqu2RkIbU2YplqPmuNh74B0hwFKSIqj3JJFxbRX59RlK0ygDNP1__UQ3-0BcBtwuDxsAJzJeGIaC1Ug82huk3C2-YXV7-qEtSpCbvDmwRWxXBJkIZRtFl4dh8XPzPufDzxgGA4bLi-qcSfy15ddhC_YBJZQavORSqQxFuDCeSqAn19DOu_1_MemWLobHtxUGWf_EKOZW-w2_oR1jNPpTJUZcY6-xpE%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: We're seeing evidence of huge amounts of leftwing money flowing into TX... | | | Fellow Conservative, This is urgent. I am asking for help. The left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to try to take me down. It's only been a few days since far-left Dem Colin Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But the massive Democrat fundraising machine is already churning out millions. There is a massive wave of cash flooding into his campaign in the 36 hours since he's announced. He's raised over $2 million in a day and a half. That is indicative of the tidal wave of cash that is going to come in- and we 're just getting started. The message is clear - Democrat donors are hellbent on flipping Texas Blue next year, and they'll spend whatever it takes to make it happen. Please send an emergency donation today to help me FIGHT BACK and Keep Texas Red! The corporate, mainstream media is already running cover for Allred. They're describing him with words like "moderate," "bipartisan," and "middle-of-the-road." But here is the truth: Look, if you're a leftist in Manhattan, San Francisco or Chicago, you're giving money to this guy, they all are... Why? Because Allred is a hardcore Democrat who voted with Pelosi 100% of the time. He voted for 87,000 new IRS agents to audit middle-income Americans. He voted for Biden 's assault on the U.S. oil and gas industry. He repeatedly voted for open borders. Colin Allred is too extreme for Texas, and I need your support RIGHT NOW to stop him. Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | | | Peter, [**_In just 2 days_ , we can ensure millions of Americans are safer, happier and healthier.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c3e0a89-40a4-49e3-a820-5e844fa07f15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_On Tuesday, an election for two open Pennsylvania State House seats will determine whether Democrats retain their current one seat majority, or MAGA Republicans take over and make Pennsylvania's schools and malls more dangerous, threaten women's rights and threaten our democracy._** _We must support Democrat Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn, who has vowed to block the permitless carry of guns to protect our kids. We must fight to ensure liberty doesn't die in the very state where it began._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52ba7d8b-8dd0-40bc-ae8d-b992fc1e76a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Boyd & Finn to fight for our basic rights and stop the authoritarian policies of MAGA Republicans._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a9252ef-748a-4a68-8b3a-338463b74410/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5146664d-0cec-4030-ae21-99379a6ad2cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| **_BREAKING:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc) We have INCREDIBLE NEWS — Congressman Jamie Raskin is “strongly considering” running for Maryland’s open Senate seat! _**YES!**_

_Due to this major update, we’re asking our 5,000 top supporters what you think:_ [**SHOULD JAMIE RASKIN RUN FOR SENATE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc) | [YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc)
---

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc)
From leading the charge to impeach Donald Trump to exposing the truth about the deadly January 6 insurrection, Jamie Raskin is a national HERO.

If he’s elected to the Senate, we’ll protect our slim 50-50 Senate majority. **_The MAGA mob’s takeover would be stopped in its tracks!_**

So before Raskin makes his decision, we need to hear from EVERY Democrat reading this by midnight:
[**SHOULD JAMIE RASKIN RUN FOR SENATE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=11&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc)
[YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230514_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=12&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc)

Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7699%2E878179%2EK-M7Xc).**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorCEK0vWe_RyejDsXPkvjB6bJotyB5orgW46bFuXcMs1fEkikM-1vypqK9dA2g7dzGPjSEMFRxsC2Ri1XYpy-YzRBp9Ho215NKPpM9foL7JLS5dnPGqo-iIu7c3bwv3uPDr6PDQnOl0QiXkNRrQUVZHg%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorE3_UbYzXxPtAmj1wjNdLMoKxAhWWRqulf7E37bdwvFQ0s6xXNmF0xOf1F1gHMlI0vb1lenSHA8JahSPu-9LP6XJdSQnsn1kzQpd_HXa62mlBeA5NbIL8z2g1lql6yTY_TWRGBfTOWgycHfQgNpSxyg%3D%3D)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorqQUJlt3mn0tfg1NNFhQe165RHdYxMoCYstfcnemeFnE0a3f3ulvid9nVIWzXwfZaRdExPVc15DK5x3Vi9J_lg3baygwFjLuFo9vscE_cpV5oHqIvvlgp-UY3ifLUC5hIvbXFIXf-GsyUjWVICMb49A%3D%3D)** It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LornkR2pI3ZVsYW4apY_QCflNzrhUpWSBGr-dcgdYinwzGZSYPkN9kt_PI4MzIzx9v7HL8N54kYpcdroJwc7IldCyQVTQ3JBfCatQFU1GwfjmK0p_9Mrh9Zy8M_fF69lMCyEH4FSLG_8m-wEyfptnLEVg%3D%3D)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorIjusP9zTRYZYAYTFNOdjXMRYppChW_DTLJ6M8JCUg6IsLEEXney-D-W_s5ykKCFtdGqOALHu72YzCxlQn3N_1dDzbu1R9KSPOUHxacE6qR8BMlgYh-Zzysmi43v2iTNAJbUSZzYzLrLQvnXfP0VUkA%3D%3D)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorgLj4flQECfy7HYQyz2oZGNnN3OBmHbHyuBVGPC7LNmN372sVwVsMyOul8aVfBAZjkwFGqs1beDY5Ec-Gw9G_s7FdTETNGqMtD2NnGX3AX4gJHV_lhXPXp4mVsV55P7tFxwm79mZWsI6qLM3oferDuw%3D%3D)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorP8ATE5VNVz2uB73Gy3s1H4F_ZVHvhxZGdDVXRSQI0IxIVtdOwwK-ejCOLvD3_OB4bxw6qPkcpsZY08XIkoZYKwYM3O7Opg01-leEyGOkEQhXF13c2S7nm_d0_sPJy9Ikoa07a53ryMyO9E4ZTYp68A%3D%3D)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today»](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4765b8ae7024a788e4017675208f910&_e=Ues-38w2CUYkWPrftBHoUwKrHCYer9TY04vssdExr9ViEPuuoCMqb0ruj3Y61QZOOM7gSFGOU8_amz0cOBWq5yte_Qv6NsdioBEoCT_nkmVKJQ0pTm8JYu1EstjJ4MA-TR9iF6CEyIvg-RfoC9Tp3kva19kAXxLPZXWL-HNlisDYe58fFJHG73o_7vywH-rkpCZA3XUWDRVu0Rr0jM6N6OTsCa-L1nb4KddOzci9hhBym2Ynmsb6KFi1x5tv2LorjGDVAG8bRfmy6TYHJfaeKOc8oqsfGz2PaEVNJJ22L9S4jVaKUbyOYEVWK9QOzHTg7de4_V33C2Kzd9HkOA3j-71Fuxgx7u_7ELmF0BFJC0_QzC0vz8-Z9OhbyRiZQsIIx_l67uy53Fv5PfJl0Iplzg%3D%3D)**
---

---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: My Mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Moms keep America running.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265363/406178516/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230514MothersDay_N_SB_30DO_4_G_N_logo&refcode2=cf15ee36-57f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjE1ZWUzNi01N2YyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i362LwPqP9DCTIqxueHCOlrh_p2ROz4vMzdzP9FxDfY=) Peter, Happy Mother’s Day.

I wanted to express my gratitude to all the incredible mothers out there and talk a little about how important my mother is to me.

By instilling in me the importance of education and perseverance, my mother made me who I am today. I would not be sitting here as Ohio 11th’s Congresswoman without her, and I am eternally indebted to her for the example she set for me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265364/406178517/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230514MothersDay_N_SB_30DO_4_G_N_logo&refcode2=cf15ee36-57f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjE1ZWUzNi01N2YyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i362LwPqP9DCTIqxueHCOlrh_p2ROz4vMzdzP9FxDfY=) As we celebrate all the amazing mothers out there today, I want you to join me in reflecting on the immeasurable impact mothers have made in your life. name: Andy Kim
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265657/406179729/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzRiYTU3ZC01N2YyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szqH0lPbK2A-AJTiBgXZxnEhefZonIQ_JInNQKHLh7c=&emci=c1bc3511-17f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b34ba57d-57f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | This Mother's Day, I wanted to share a story and express my gratitude to my mother and all the incredible mothers out there. Fifty years ago, my mother made a brave decision that changed our family's path. She left South Korea and immigrated to the United States, leaving behind her family and friends for a country where she didn't know anyone. **It was a tough choice and one that brought on many hardships, but her determination and resilience also created countless opportunities.** Just a few weeks ago, I had the privilege of bringing my mother to be my guest at the White House for the State Dinner between the United States and South Korea, the two nations of her life. It was an unforgettable moment for us and one that I know was filled with meaning and reflection for my mother. **So this Mother's Day and every day, I want to acknowledge and celebrate the hard work and dedication of my mother and mothers everywhere. Happy Mother's Day.** With gratitude, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

clean_body: | | | | This Mother's Day, I wanted to share a story and express my gratitude to my mother and all the incredible mothers out there. Fifty years ago, my mother made a brave decision that changed our family's path. She left South Korea and immigrated to the United States, leaving behind her family and friends for a country where she didn't know anyone. It was a tough choice and one that brought on many hardships, but her determination and resilience also created countless opportunities. Just a few weeks ago, I had the privilege of bringing my mother to be my guest at the White House for the State Dinner between the United States and South Korea, the two nations of her life. It was an unforgettable moment for us and one that I know was filled with meaning and reflection for my mother. So this Mother's Day and every day, I want to acknowledge and celebrate the hard work and dedication of my mother and mothers everywhere. Happy Mother's Day. With gratitude, Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Becca Balint
subject: Fight like a mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
For many, today can be challenging. Feel free to skip this message if you need.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265783/406180485/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM1ODAwZi01OGYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GI-C04hN49wNf0ukG6URh5-270hr-Y94Q7CZwjp1FYo=&emci=a5108d00-dcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3035800f-58f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | _Mother’s Day can be a challenging time for many of us — especially for those who cannot be with their moms or who have lost loved ones. I am thinking of you today. Please take care of yourself and feel free to skip this message if you need._ Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish every mom on this team a Happy Mother’s Day! After the past couple of years we’ve had, each and every one of you deserves a trophy — or at the very least, a moment of peace. Motherhood is unconditional love, sacrifice, immeasurable joy, and complications. It’s hard work that’s often overlooked and undervalued in our society. Despite this, I know that there is no work more important than cultivating the next generation of leaders and changemakers — **_which is why I’m committed to fighting like a mom for our families in Congress:_** _As a mom,_ I’m fighting for paid family leave, because I know how critical it is that new parents are able to spend precious time with their infants. _As a mom,_ I’m fighting to defend reproductive freedom and access to contraception, because decisions about when and how to grow a family are deeply personal and belong with individual people – not politicians. _As a mom,_ I’m fighting for higher, fairer wages so that parents can put a roof over their children’s heads, healthy food on their kitchen tables, and provide the necessities their kids need to grow and thrive. _As a mom,_ I'm fighting for affordable childcare for all, because parents should not have to choose between a career they love and safe, reliable care for their young children. _As a mom,_ I’m fighting to fund our public schools, because I know that a quality education sets kids up for a lifetime of personal and financial success. _As a mom,_ I’m fighting to make progress on America’s mental health crisis, because I know that both teens AND adults need support to navigate the challenges and stressors that come with everyday life. **Fighting like a mom means passing policies that will uplift America’s working families and make life easier for moms, dads, parents, and step parents across the country. To all the moms out there: know that I am in your corner, and I’ll always fight with parents and kids in mind in Washington.** Happy Mother’s Day! — Becca Balint **Becca is the first woman, the first openly LGBTQ+ person, and the first mom representing Vermont in Congress. She’s fighting for working families and a better future for generations to come.[In honor of Mother’s Day, will you chip in to Becca’s campaign and help fuel her fight in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265784/406180486/-146036107?refcode=E21453-20230514-MothersDay-SL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM1ODAwZi01OGYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GI-C04hN49wNf0ukG6URh5-270hr-Y94Q7CZwjp1FYo=)** [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63265785/406180492/-146036107?refcode=E21453-20230514-MothersDay-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM1ODAwZi01OGYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GI-C04hN49wNf0ukG6URh5-270hr-Y94Q7CZwjp1FYo=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: The very cherished moms of our team
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63267030/406185836/1077680223?refcode=fl_em_act_20230514mosday_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjODM1NC01OWYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwfV9otvsBL3Fhtkirh68fOK5DQcV8ZZ5iDpBivpHKY=)
---
Hi team, This Mother's Day, I'm thinking of all the amazing moms that are a part of Team Moore-Miller. I'm thinking of Aruna's mom, Hema, and my mom, Joy. Two extraordinary women who came to this country with hope in their hearts, not just for themselves, but for future generations. They are proof that in Maryland, anything is possible. I'm thinking of Aruna, who has three daughters of her own. And who has fought for moms as a public servant, a delegate in our state House, and now as our lieutenant governor. I'm thinking of my amazing wife and partner, Dawn, who has been with me through my time in the Army, running a small business, and the harrows of the campaign trail. She is a true light, and Maryland is lucky to have her as our first lady. **[We are lucky on Team Miller-Moore to be surrounded by so many amazing mothers. Please join me in showing them how cherished they are by signing our Mother's Day card to them.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63267031/406185837/263777303?ms=fl_em_act_20230514mosday_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjODM1NC01OWYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwfV9otvsBL3Fhtkirh68fOK5DQcV8ZZ5iDpBivpHKY=&emci=a34a185b-dff0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6eec8354-59f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63267032/406185843/263777303?ms=fl_em_act_20230514mosday_wm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjODM1NC01OWYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwfV9otvsBL3Fhtkirh68fOK5DQcV8ZZ5iDpBivpHKY=&emci=a34a185b-dff0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6eec8354-59f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
[Sign The Card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63267033/406185850/263777303?ms=fl_em_act_20230514mosday_wm_180da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjODM1NC01OWYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwfV9otvsBL3Fhtkirh68fOK5DQcV8ZZ5iDpBivpHKY=&emci=a34a185b-dff0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6eec8354-59f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
And of course, I'm wishing a Happy Mother's Day to all of the amazing moms across Maryland. You are the backbones of your families, your communities, and our state. For too long, our country has left you behind with a heavier and heavier load. I want you to know I see you and am fighting every day to lighten your burdens.
Elevate,
Wes
P.S. I couldn't let this day pass without a mention of my grandmother Mama Win, on whose shoulders I stand. I miss her every day, and feel blessed beyond measure that she was able to vote for me – at 95-years-old – before she passed. Love you forever, Mama Win.

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Happy Mother's Day
body:
Mothers Are Truly a Gift from God
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
Happy Mother's Day to all the amazing Mothers out there. If you are like me and your mom is no longer with you, I pray that you are filled with warm memories of her on this special day. May her love live in your heart forever.
God in His wisdom gifted women in a way to reflect His image. Women are chosen with the honor of bringing life into the world. Mothers are nurturers and they demonstrate the nurturing of God. Like our earthly moms, God is patient with us, and He cares deeply for us. In times of difficulty, He doesn't leave us to ourselves. He is always there to encourage us, especially in times of need.
Today we celebrate moms, their unconditional love for their children, reflected God's love for all His children. We may not all be Mothers, but we all have one that we love dearly and can remember on this special day.
Caroline Colarusso

---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: What I want for my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1009&amount=25&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ][IMG]

Happy Mother’s Day, Peter!

Out of everything I’ve experienced in my life, raising my daughter has
been my favorite part, no contest.

I’ll tell anyone who’ll listen that I’m one of those moms, because being
Alex’s mom is the most fun I’ve ever had and the most precious gift I
could imagine.

When Alex was little, I knew I wanted a safer community for her to grow up
in. That was all the reason I needed to run for office for the first time
back in 2010. And from my great-grandmother to my grandmother to my own
mom, I grew up surrounded by women who made loving sacrifices to give
their kids a better future.

I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate just a few days ago, so this
Mother’s Day has me thinking about what kind of world I want to pass down
to Alex and the work it’s going to take to make that possible.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1010&amount=25&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]I’m running for Senate to build an equitable and just future for our
kids. Will you pitch in $25 to support me in this fight?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1011&amount=25&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Donate

A Good Education, No Matter Your Zip Code

Few things are more important than educating the next generation and
setting our kids up for success.

But it’s a sad truth that in Maryland and across the nation, your zip code
is the best predictor of the quality of your child’s education.

That’s why, as County Executive, making sure every Prince George's student
has access to a quality education has been one of my top priorities:
historic funding for education, breaking ground on ten new schools, and
providing the tools for successful online learning.

In the Senate, I’ll expand the progress we started in Prince George’s and
make sure that every student has access to a quality education to help
them thrive.

Defending the Right to Choose

I’m deeply committed to protecting abortion rights in Maryland and across
the nation.

Defending the right to choose isn’t just about protecting abortion access;
it’s about defending the progress women have fought for over the past 50
years and refusing to let anti-choice extremists take that away.

I’ve fought injustice my entire career and reproductive injustice is no
exception. In the United States Senate, I will fight tooth and nail to
protect the right to choose for all Marylanders.

A Fairer Economy

Alex can tell you that I don’t just toss things out as soon as they break.
Give me the product manual and a bottle of Krazy Glue and I’ll do whatever
I need to do to get it working right again.

I bring the same energy to fixing big things, like our economy.

As County Executive, I found creative ways to harness the strengths of our
community to bring opportunities to the folks who usually get left out.

We created a program to allocate at least $225 million in contracting
opportunities for local and minority-owned businesses, and helped 17,000
teens gain valuable work experience.

Innovative ideas work at the county level, and they’ll work at the federal
level too. That’s how we’ll make sure that working families can enjoy a
good quality of life and that all Americans have an equal chance to
achieve prosperity, no matter where they come from.

Peter, my hopes for the future don’t end there. From tackling
the very serious threat of climate change, to reducing the cost of living,
to building a more just justice system, I’ve got a long to-do list – and I
need you by my side every step of the way.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1012&amount=25&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Will you invest in a brighter future for the next generation of
Marylanders and chip in $25 to my campaign for U.S. Senate?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1013&amount=25&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1014&amount=50&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1015&amount=100&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1016&amount=200&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1007&amount=250&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1067?t=1008&amount=35&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Other Amount

With gratitude,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=1004&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=1005&akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=58%2E52803%2E39yX5m

Largo, MD 20792

subject: UPDATE: Debt Default

body:
we are done playing games
#
Peter, we wanted to reach out and give you an update on Senator Durbin’s work to protect Americans from the most recent reckless policies of MAGA Republicans.
Last week, Senator Durbin spoke on the Senate floor to call out Republican Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy for threatening the first-ever federal debt default in U.S. history if the Democrats don’t go along with his budget cuts.
MAGA Republicans' proposal would cut funding for important services like:
* First responders and veterans.
* Affordable health care for families.
* And on top of that, they're also looking to cut access to food assistance programs for millions of Americans, which is just wrong.

We can't let these harmful policies take effect and put people's lives at risk. That's why we need to stand together and fight against them.

To make things worse, if we don’t raise the debt ceiling, our country will go into unprecedented economic turmoil.
MAGA Republicans are playing partisan games with the debt ceiling, which is not only dangerous, but fiscally irresponsible. Making lawmakers choose between defaulting on the federal debt or cutting programs and services that many Americans depend on is not a game we will play.
**[To take back the House, hold the Senate, keep the White House, and put a stop to the MAGA games, contribute right now>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63270786/406200319/-860735192?refcode=dd_em_230514_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODBjYWE5Zi01ZmYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-rC90woyoHJqYpUDvVZFdsZA28welc1JFjtu1s_tt6w=)**

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63270862/406200409/823540626?refcode=ea.82913a99-5ff2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.82913a99-5ff2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjkxM2E5OS01ZmYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeLc_7upy8ArNS9BII1J_sh8icAAJyxyfSDixVQCEvs=&emci=70271f9f-3ff0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=82913a99-5ff2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

Now, the fight for reproductive freedom in our state continues. In the next few days, extremist Republican legislators will attempt to overturn his veto. And we know they won’t stop there. Republicans have gerrymandered our state to give them a supermajority in the state legislature so they can override the will of the Governor – and the people – to pass extremist bills just like this abortion ban bill. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We need to trust our legislators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need leaders like Pramila to keep the focus on building a democracy rooted in justice, equality, and compassion for one another.
#
Peter, we need to be able to trust our legislators.
Yet week after week, there are more uncovered instances of corruption, injustice, and dishonorable actions in Congress and the Supreme Court.
We need leaders like Pramila to keep the focus on building a democracy rooted in justice, equality, and compassion for one another. And we need grassroots movements like these to keep up the pressure in our communities so everyone can feel the impact of our progressive ideas.
**We’re building up our resources to keep up this fight, if we reach an additional 150 contributions by Monday at midnight — we’ll be right on track****.**[**Can we count on you to chip in a donation of any amount to help us secure the resources we need over the next 48 hours?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41918?refcode=em20230514-2477&t=1&akid=2477%2E420207%2EMnyeGY)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41918?refcode=em20230514-2477&t=2&akid=2477%2E420207%2EMnyeGY)**
Our momentum is completely powered by small-dollar donations from hardworking people in our communities who have faith in this work. Because Pramila knows that **the real power lies with the people** — not the bad actors who try to manipulate our government.
The work we’re doing today will pave the way for a safer, more inclusive future for generations to come — but only if we seize every opportunity to make change. We know there are solutions to the issues we face, and our collective voice is just the tool we need to see this change come to light.
[**With just two days left to go until our mid-month deadline, we’re hoping to close our fundraising gap with your support. Please chip in today to help us reach our goal and grow our movement’s power.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41918?refcode=em20230514-2477&t=3&akid=2477%2E420207%2EMnyeGY)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41918?refcode=em20230514-2477&t=22&akid=2477%2E420207%2EMnyeGY)**
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230514-2477-footer&t=23&refcode2=2477_420207_MnyeGY&akid=2477%2E420207%2EMnyeGY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

### Drink your way down a pant-size with Superfoods!

It means the world to our entire team -- Joe included! Joe is calling a few Founding Donors to personally say thanks for being a part of this team. Thank you for being on this team, Peter. name: Emily Busch
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=4ef6be333da84769940b5b10d75fcc00&_e=zbJKXqnCXRq4Ledv7unCuS_nNQDlvnnDGaFALXZmUAApouUcdXF3XmQi8vo65wvIqZrK-RSdmOBuPlHaoUKrqfQKWtmfsEjXt_6z56hgisY0Dh-Pn_cXdt-WOApIWsXpg_9piGW-5w2aBG1n4uJfsDeZPSCeQEwIu0vycgrVqADRu6mT7MjyzEcnrHDs6EvZuvXAgejWrSziGHIvspcxMQ%3D%3D) Happy Mother’s Day!Today, I wanted to take a moment to wish all the mothers in Michigan and across the nation a happy and peaceful day with their loved ones.**My promise to mothers across the nation:** when I get to Washington, I will address the issue of gun violence in our schools and communities head-on. I will work tirelessly on solutions to end this epidemic so no other mother has to experience the pain of losing a child from gun violence; I cannot imagine what living with that is like. Please know, as a mom, I am here to support you anyway I can.I wish you all a peaceful and joyous Mother's Day.– Emily Busch PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

clean_body: | | | Happy Mother’s Day!Today, I wanted to take a moment to wish all the mothers in Michigan and across the nation a happy and peaceful day with their loved ones.My promise to mothers across the nation: when I get to Washington, I will address the issue of gun violence in our schools and communities head-on. I will work tirelessly on solutions to end this epidemic so no other mother has to experience the pain of losing a child from gun violence; I cannot imagine what living with that is like. Please know, as a mom, I am here to support you anyway I can.I wish you all a peaceful and joyous Mother's Day.– Emily Busch PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

_My amazing kids, Nevada & Cody _ Happy Mother’s Day, folks! I spent thirty years managing nonprofit organizations and tackling complex, deeply-rooted issues like homelessness, school dropout, and education discrepancies. But the job that’s kept me up at night the most is motherhood, hands down! And I don’t just mean 3 AM diaper changes and monsters under the bed. I’m talking about lying awake, thinking about all of the things I’m determined to make better for my kids and all the things that make me worried about the future. I know my mom felt the same way when my siblings and I were growing up, and I’ll always be so grateful for the times she gladly took less so we could have more. As a member of Congress, I have a special responsibility to tackle the challenges of the future not just for my own kids, but for every child who calls NV-03 home. _I take that responsibility very seriously._ That’s why I’m fighting to make sure that **every girl growing up today can count on the same rights and freedoms I’ve enjoyed.** That’s why I’m fighting for every young Nevadan to be able to enjoy the natural beauty of our state for generations to come, **free of the dangers of droughts, storms, and wildfires.** That’s why I’m fighting for an education system that gives students the guidance they need to grow into **compassionate, capable, and responsible adults.** That’s why I’m fighting for an economy that works for working people and gives every child **an equal shot at prosperity.** There’s so much work left to do before we can say that we’ve set the next generation up for success. But unfortunately, the GOP is desperate to drag us backwards. **If we want to continue our forward momentum, we need to put some real muscle into this tug-of-war.** [**Will you invest in the next generation’s success and chip in $25 to this fight for a brighter future for Nevada?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63275370/406211332/267372871?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230506_FR_Fundraising_A0_NA_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmY2OTRjZC02M2YyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2t_adAQdHTe2lrxjtsqLDtt_z7WyTNTN2tO0lxxqfuQ=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63275372/406211334/267372871?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230514_FR_MothersDay_A0_NA_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmY2OTRjZC02M2YyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2t_adAQdHTe2lrxjtsqLDtt_z7WyTNTN2tO0lxxqfuQ=)

clean_body: | | | = My amazing kids, Nevada & Cody Happy Mother’s Day, folks! I spent thirty years managing nonprofit organizations and tackling complex, deeply-rooted issues like homelessness, school dropout, and education discrepancies. But the job that’s kept me up at night the most is motherhood, hands down! And I don’t just mean 3 AM diaper changes and monsters under the bed. I’m talking about lying awake, thinking about all of the things I’m determined to make better for my kids and all the things that make me worried about the future. I know my mom felt the same way when my siblings and I were growing up, and I’ll always be so grateful for the times she gladly took less so we could have more. As a member of Congress, I have a special responsibility to tackle the challenges of the future not just for my own kids, but for every child who calls NV-03 home. I take that responsibility very seriously. That’s why I’m fighting to make sure that every girl growing up today can count on the same rights and freedoms I’ve enjoyed. That’s why I’m fighting for every young Nevadan to be able to enjoy the natural beauty of our state for generations to come, free of the dangers of droughts, storms, and wildfires. That’s why I’m fighting for an education system that gives students the guidance they need to grow into compassionate, capable, and responsible adults. That’s why I’m fighting for an economy that works for working people and gives every child an equal shot at prosperity. There’s so much work left to do before we can say that we’ve set the next generation up for success. But unfortunately, the GOP is desperate to drag us backwards. If we want to continue our forward momentum, we need to put some real muscle into this tug-of-war. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. I’m so very appreciative of your support.
