clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, This Mother's Day, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude and appreciation for all the wonderful mothers out there who have dedicated their lives to nurturing and caring for their children. Mothers are the bedrock of our families and communities, and they play an essential role in shaping the future of our society. They inspire us with their selflessness, their unwavering love, and their tireless efforts to make the world a better place. As we celebrate this day, let us take a moment to honor and recognize the hard work and sacrifices that mothers make each day. Whether it's waking up early to prepare breakfast, staying up late to finish work, or simply being there to listen and support us when we need it the most, mothers always go above and beyond for their children. As a mother myself, I know firsthand the joys and challenges that come with this role. It is a privilege to be a mother, and I am grateful for the opportunity to be a part of my children's lives. To all the wonderful mothers out there, I want to wish you a very happy Mother's Day. May your day be filled with joy, love, and the warmth of your loved ones. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

With roughly 24 HOURS to go until my Bedminster Dinner Contest officially ends, I simply had to check in with you one more time.
This is truly a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to celebrate with your favorite president on the eve of my birthday. _**And as one of my TOP supporters, I was shocked to see YOUR name missing from the list of entries my team just handed me. **_
That’s why **[I recorded this special video](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kTGPozAQhX_N0IHMGGxTUNyGTRPdFdfsddHENsnksGHBHMq_PxFlt_3e0-h9GgrTwP2jBf0GiDd2CyCC_AGIp-rtzy91-jh1-WfY3vNO1dW2p3gAxPSY_Hf1daXwgXjYqe4y16I1aG3m21KZShhTlZjdWmrIK0_WEElTamfrWvnG9D0qkr3WGbcoUIq6rEqDQjRFiT1dLheNSqDRpYFKbBwLN0Ya3D3Na5gKO4ZsaG8pTctz0hHwuHi7zr7YOM7e7Y2d0T-fU_AzW8rvI8eU92t0M_HC8ZrbMQROyXvAo7TKXnStayVUo6UBeVxTOAfveA0gu5es2uEyrrP1IDvLZ3oxS2EivkaQ3ZfQVzLG5GMC2TUCJaA6x4EdyO4wHX5__PzbK_2Ez3fITp0eTX_H989sbt208TDwojRU4rov2MX-BwAA___iR4vV)** to invite YOU to enter.
If you win, I’ll take care of EVERYTHING for you and your guest: your flights, your accommodations, your tickets to the dinner...
...And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you can remember this incredible evening forever!

This is truly a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to celebrate with your favorite president on the eve of my birthday. body:
I want you to know how important you are to this campaign.

Peter -
I want you to know how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about my most important supporters, I don’t think about the ones who are the biggest donors.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far more than 100,000 people have contributed to either my House or Senate campaigns.
But now that we’re halfway to our first, full FEC fundraising deadline I need you now more than ever.
Out of all the people who have supported all of my campaigns less than 3% have made a contribution.
Today, I am humbly asking you to join them:

name: John Fetterman
subject: Did you see this update about PA's Senate race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our senior senator Bob Casey is facing a tough reelection fight in 2024.
#
Hi Derek,
All eyes are gonna be on PA to see what happens in 2024 – and we've got to be ready for anything. And the truth is, my friend Bob Casey's Senate race is gonna be a real toss-up.
**Roll Call just rated Pennsylvania's 2024 Senate race a battleground** -- and there isn't even an official GOP challenger yet. That means our slim Democratic majority in the Senate depends on this team coming together to re-elect Bob Casey to keep fighting for PA families. 💪
**[Derek, if you can, will you split a contribution between our campaign and Bob Casey's today so they can build a strong campaign + fight back against the GOP's million$?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230514-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230514-1-8374&refcode2=8374_434096_GjvsP7&akid=8374%2E434096%2EGjvsP7)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230514-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230514-8374&refcode2=8374_434096_GjvsP7&akid=8374%2E434096%2EGjvsP7)**
Look, we're already expecting the same super PAC million$ + right-wing smear campaigns we faced last year will come pouring in to try to beat Bob Casey.
But this grassroots team -- I'm talking about yinz and youse-- protected + expanded our Democratic majority in the Senate before, and I KNOW we can do it again. If we build the foundation now, we'll have a strong campaign when it really counts.
**[It's up to us to fight back and keep two Democrats representing PA in the Senate. If you can, split a contribution between our campaign + Bob Casey right away.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230514-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230514-1-8374&refcode2=8374_434096_GjvsP7&akid=8374%2E434096%2EGjvsP7)**
Thank you SO much -- and happy Mothers Day!
❤️John
John Fetterman
U.S Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230514-8374-footer&t=1&refcode2=8374_434096_GjvsP7&akid=8374%2E434096%2EGjvsP7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Emma Dillon, Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The next 47 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’ve officially reached the halfway mark of our second fundraising quarter — and now we need your help to pick up the pace.
#
Hi Peter, I’ll keep this quick.
We’ve officially reached the halfway mark of our second quarter — and the reality is that our fundraising lately has been a little slower than usual.
**If we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce next year, it’s absolutely critical that we pick up the pace over the next 47 days.[Will you help us stay on track by adding your first donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our campaign right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33064?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33065?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33064?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1)
---
Each quarter, we have an opportunity to show the insiders + pundits watching our race exactly how much grassroots support is behind Lucas Kunce. They’re able to see all the numbers on how much money we’ve raised — and they’ll use that information to judge whether or not we’re building a movement that’s strong enough to win.
**We already proved last quarter that our campaign has a solid foundation of grassroots support, but now we need to keep it going.** National GOP insiders are doing everything in their power to tear Lucas down and we need folks like you to keep standing strong behind him. So what do you say, Peter?
**[Will you help us stay on track to crush our goal this quarter and defeat Josh Hawley by chipping in $10 or whatever you think is best right now? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so we mean it when we say anything you can afford makes a big impact on our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33064?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1)**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33064?refcode=em20230514-3120&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1)**
Thank you,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230514-3120-footer&t=11&refcode2=3120_614464_wEomR1&akid=3120%2E614464%2EwEomR1)**

clean_body: | Peter, we’re counting on YOU to become a Founding Donor of Team Allred in our race against Ted Cruz before midnight. Here’s why this is so important: -Ted Cruz IS beatable: 46% of Texans DISAPPROVE of the job he’s doing. -CNN ranked Cruz as one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the country. -We need to raise $150,000 today – it’s going to take an unprecedented outpouring of grassroots support to win. = = | = Texans deserve better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. We’ve all watched as Cruz bowed down to Donald Trump, peddled baseless lies about the 2020 election even as rioters stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and fled to Cancun while Texans were freezing in their homes. Now, we have a chance to replace him with a leader who will fight for our fundamental rights, from voting to reproductive freedom. And flipping this seat blue would all but guarantee Democrats protect our razor-thin Senate majority – a majority we must protect with the future of so many of our shared values on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Team Allred | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. | Upcoming Events
---
| COME JOIN US
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

This week is National Police Week. I've always supported our law enforcement community in the General Assembly, and I'll continue to oppose any attempts from far leftists who want to defund the police.

Join us this Thursday, May 18, for a Meet & Greet in Brandermill, invitation below.

To commemorate Armed Forces Day on Saturday, May 20 we are hosting a free breakfast. There are only a few remaining seats, which are reserved for Veterans and their families. [Please sign up today](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

And come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

clean_body: We hope to see you soon | | | | == | Upcoming Events | COME JOIN US | | | ---|--- Dear Friends, This week is National Police Week. I've always supported our law enforcement community in the General Assembly, and I'll continue to oppose any attempts from far leftists who want to defund the police. Join us this Thursday, May 18, for a Meet & Greet in Brandermill, invitation below. To commemorate Armed Forces Day on Saturday, May 20 we are hosting a free breakfast. There are only a few remaining seats, which are reserved for Veterans and their families. mailto:chris@chaseforva.com. And come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door. We look forward to seeing you this week. * **First,** _Politico_ reported that winning in Ohio could make or break our chances of keeping the Senate blue.

Sherrod
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. name: Ashley
subject: To our mothers, single parents, caretakers, and guardians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
As we take the day to celebrate motherhood in all its forms, it’s not lost on me that my right to choose whether or not to become a mom has been stripped away from me and millions of women across the country. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63289218/406255215/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_na_20230514mothersday_ae_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1N2VmNC04YWYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_8oL5Fviy7mFEZcNPhrm2KaWywUn8QV7MHVYXo_ems=)
---
Friends — Today, I would like to honor the mothers, single parents, caretakers, and guardians in our lives who are the bedrock of each and every community. **As we take the day to celebrate motherhood in all its forms, it’s not lost on me that my right to choose whether or not to become a mom has been stripped away from me and millions of women across the country.** Since last summer, when the Supreme Court struck down the right to an abortion, things have only gotten worse. State legislatures have gone even further to pass dangerous laws that criminalize doctors, clinics, and patients. Every week there's another story of a woman having to travel out of state for proper health care, or literally waiting in the hospital parking lot until she's at risk of a heart attack so that she can receive life-saving treatment. Right after Roe v. Wade was overturned last year, my opponent, **Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, voted against the _Women's Health Protection Act_ which could have stopped _all_ of this.** Reproductive choice is one of the fundamental freedoms I fought for as an Army pilot. I did not sacrifice years of my life to defend our country and fight for our rights just to watch politicians like Fitzpatrick take them away. **I am running for Congress to fight for meaningful policies that will support ALL mothers and caretakers,** including paid family leave, universal childcare, affordable healthcare, funding our public schools, and so much more. Generations of mothers and grandmothers came before us and raised hell to give us a better life. It’s on us to do the same for the next generation and beyond. Thanks for reading. I hope it’s a special day for you and your loved ones. Respectfully, Ashley Ehasz | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

clean_body: | | | Peter, During my time in office, I’ve seen the Democrats lurch farther and farther left. We’re no longer two parties who simply have different political opinions: we now have the party of socialism and the party of freedom, and right now, EVERY American has to make a choice. We have a deadline to defeat the socialist Democrats and I need every single patriot on our team to step up. This mid-month goal is CRITICAL to our victory, and I’m counting on you. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24d21cfb-3e14-482c-a9ba-e3e4a88fd6d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_The Mother's Day Blue Letter 5/14/23_** Happy Mother's Day! I hope you take the time to enjoy yourselves and thank the moms who do the glamorous & unglamorous, balance work, family and much more. Thank you! _Here is your Mother's Day Blue Letter:_ 🔥 The CNN-Trump Townhall Was A Catastrophe. An interview clip w/ Pullitzer winning Philly Inquirer columnist, Will Bunch, w/ my added analysis. Watch! [bit.ly/3Msoh0h](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdc395f3-3e8b-4aee-a11f-3a548386a4de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * _Also: The full interview here! _[bit.ly/43czdVp](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf0f5287-016e-402d-8480-e8f3c17a2c90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 🔥 Lying Fraud George Santos Indicted! FINALLY. Check It Out! [bit.ly/3W20Spq](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80b39d2d-9ae2-4eac-a08f-5b8368a0a821/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81d73fae-0ab2-4c55-ac46-f44d0cd9936d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Please, rush $7 or anything you can by midnight to defend vulnerable Democrats like Tammy Baldwin! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45090?t=7&akid=7701%2E878179%2EwoIh5_) | [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: RUSH $7 TO SAVE THE SENATE FROM A TOTAL MAGA TAKEOVER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45090?t=8&akid=7701%2E878179%2EwoIh5_)

[That’s why we’ve set a $20,000 goal to protect top targets like Tammy Baldwin and stop the GOP from seizing Senate control! It’s up to grassroots supporters like YOU to help us stop them: Rush $7 to our Senate Battleground Fund before midnight to defend our Senate majority! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45090?t=9&akid=7701%2E878179%2EwoIh5_)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. [I hope you will take a minute to read it all the way through and when you're done, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and The Collective PAC?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cmHjMvWOD5NwNTo6pkCi84PKbUWnIJPgDzETGlz4pffcRpbxDLeBrbhN-vzoW4YmQw0uLRHNrhY6tGMf100xWCmHqHh2qrSlR700_hysKImYMpTXCs57ngPSzRTcVzvO2vcYME3k_9NrITH91G0W_aAoI4j9m0Ik8bJfA9k_oZBmImBKpAxc3cCjOXU0qq-RnS9-Yws-dET2qUa-Yw-1b9j8E6zDNDEdLgmX2mgoO4JQXlPJwBn00PZE5xnebvTgGHD9-2sk_4z_PPl8XpHDeo7yhk9xV3_NyM1jo9DnfwbN54q495HE18YymzxpLIU5qW-2nn7NpfGeJ14L_DfBSpO0YqWiGmCjYhcIxzGw8UXDKHOp0Qqb4O9s3DhdezXisWMe1DBzpxdnijBFUU0Mn2eaVtrYDN3JXO4WmbaYCaWg/3w6/sh0DZlqOSWuNG-HW3MQMlw/h2/Sfnm_cKS8L48B5-pP6vdt6oDkq7zX9wjYSfHN6e0AEU)

By now, I’m sure you’ve already been made aware: **We were outraised and outspent last quarter by two other candidates in this race.** And on top of that, political experts are already predicting this could be the most expensive Senate primary in our nation's history.

But I'm not worried. I don't need to raise the most money in this race – I just need to raise enough to spread my progressive message across the state and win. Because with recent polling showing that a large number of California voters are undecided on who to vote for, **victory is well within our reach.**

That is why tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline is so important. These next few months will be absolutely critical to the success of this campaign, and I need to make sure I have the resources needed to reach voters and take on any new challenges I may face on the road to Election Day.

Believe me, I know this team is already working incredibly hard on this race, and with your help we raised nearly a million dollars last month alone.**I’m incredibly grateful for your support and everything you've done thus far, Peter. But with just hours until my midnight fundraising deadline, I'm falling short of my $25,000 goal.**

**That's why I'm personally asking you to join me and dig just a little bit deeper. If you’re able to, please:** [Will you split a donation – anything you can spare before midnight – between myself and The Collective PAC to help us hit this crucial midnight goal and build a progressive future for all? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cmHjMvWOD5NwNTo6pkCi84PKbUWnIJPgDzETGlz4pffcRpbxDLeBrbhN-vzoW4YmQw0uLRHNrhY6tGMf100xWCmHqHh2qrSlR700_hysKImYMpTXCs57ngPSzRTcVzvO2vcYME3k_9NrITH91G0W_aNeDZ-i_Iwicv8PbiQ1R5PepVhEdpy64-1ZGMYBsixpJggRU7hCVTUvhy7ZDcPxJiBOg2JDPRV39DAHc5IoNv-iz0b5NuI2B8TBjtqEp1QTWSPdhI1ErSjFf_A3iSU2CbSUUY4cmqudqPMJ0pHp9XE99jXQ-nxquJ5m_3Olh2d7SpkEQRtO8WS1dbj8ttA1O-l08LqUOP_5Gs8uHc7pvWiva6X3OT-emwoMk8iDmOAh-BWQMGKCFnGZsBYK6FZGG7NU3KRrN1dx9mzbS1g9-E-g/3w6/sh0DZlqOSWuNG-HW3MQMlw/h3/tjrRmDqupDFVe_bvDajtQdBSOIZfHaBzkwgplLHDAq8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, sorry this email is a bit longer, but it's a very important update. By now, I’m sure you’ve already been made aware: We were outraised and outspent last quarter by two other candidates in this race. And on top of that, political experts are already predicting this could be the most expensive Senate primary in our nation's history. But I'm not worried. I don't need to raise the most money in this race – I just need to raise enough to spread my progressive message across the state and win. Because with recent polling showing that a large number of California voters are undecided on who to vote for, victory is well within our reach. That is why tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline is so important. These next few months will be absolutely critical to the success of this campaign, and I need to make sure I have the resources needed to reach voters and take on any new challenges I may face on the road to Election Day. Believe me, I know this team is already working incredibly hard on this race, and with your help we raised nearly a million dollars last month alone.I’m incredibly grateful for your support and everything you've done thus far, Peter. But with just hours until my midnight fundraising deadline, I'm falling short of my $25,000 goal. That's why I'm personally asking you to join me and dig just a little bit deeper. If you’re able to, please: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Jon Tester
subject: I wouldn’t reach out unless it was urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I wouldn’t reach out unless it was urgent, folks:

Tomorrow at midnight is our mid-May fundraising deadline, and we’re still
$4,291 short of our goal. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18955?t=1001&akid=3231%2E346206%2EZOrp7l ]Can you pitch in a split donation right now
-- between my campaign and Charles Booker -- so we can continue the work
of defending Montana’s Senate seat and protecting our Senate majority?

CHIP IN →

Thanks,

Jon Tester

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18955?t=1002&akid=3231%2E346206%2EZOrp7l ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230514-3231-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3231_346206_ZOrp7l&akid=3231%2E346206%2EZOrp7l

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3231%2E346206%2EZOrp7l

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Our team is working overtime to prepare for the challenges ahead and ensure we're fully equipped to keep up the fight against gerrymandering.
We know that this is a critical moment in our fight for fair maps. With the end of the Supreme Court term just around the corner, we're anxiously awaiting their decision on _Moore v. Harper_.

clean_body: Things could get worse. | = = We're on the clock, team. Our team is working overtime to prepare for the challenges ahead and ensure we're fully equipped to keep up the fight against gerrymandering. We know that this is a critical moment in our fight for fair maps. With the end of the Supreme Court term just around the corner, we're anxiously awaiting their decision on Moore v. Harper. We are sounding the alarm because things could get worse team. Here’s a sneak peek at what’s to come if checks and balances for redistricting aren’t upheld in the Moore v. Harper decision:**** ➡️ Partisan gerrymandering could reach new extremes. ➡️ Our system of federal elections would be turned on its head. ➡️ State legislators could potentially undermine election results they don't like. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Remember, SCOTUS decisions will be made any day now. There's no time to waste. = \-- Olivia Mendoza Director, Policy & Litigation All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Here are just a few ways your donation to claim your membership could be used to fuel our work and help elect state Democrats. | | |

| | **We’re reaching out again about your inactive 2023 DLCC membership.** We wanted to let you know how your membership could help power our work in the states. * Members support the DLCC’s work to reach every possible voter through digital channels, ads, and local news.

name: Bob Casey

body:
Happy Mother’s Day. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63290075/406260501/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQxOWFhMS05MmYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zFtNIoFBEEr3rlYk3Z-9hx4Fr9Y9vfmo1BwPjy_8vg=&emci=1a5ce162-72f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85419aa1-92f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter, I want to start by wishing a happy Mother’s Day to three important mothers in my own life: my mother Ellen, who raised eight kids with grace and perseverance and who continues to serve as an example to all her children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren; my wife Terese, who is my biggest supporter and the best mother to our four daughters and Mimi to our two grandsons; and my daughter Elyse, who is now a mother to two sons of her own. I’m also wishing a day of celebration, rest, and love to the hard-working mothers all across our Commonwealth. And to anyone experiencing this day as one of loss or sadness, I hope it will pass gently. **Raising children is one of the hardest jobs there is — and we’re not doing enough to support mothers in this country.** That is why one of my leading priorities as a U.S. Senator is fighting for our working families: through improving child health and education programs, increasing access to SNAP and other nutrition programs, making child care more affordable, ensuring access to paid family and medical leave, and expanding pregnancy-related and postpartum health care coverage. Our work is far from over, which is why I’m running for re-election to continue championing mothers and our working families. No one will work harder than I will to make sure we aren’t just celebrating moms once a year on Mother’s Day, but instead putting real solutions in place that will help support them every day. With gratitude, Bob Casey **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63290076/406260502/578963885?refcode=em20230514-ngp&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=8943725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQxOWFhMS05MmYyLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zFtNIoFBEEr3rlYk3Z-9hx4Fr9Y9vfmo1BwPjy_8vg=)**

clean_body: Happy Mother’s Day. Peter, I want to start by wishing a happy Mother’s Day to three important mothers in my own life: my mother Ellen, who raised eight kids with grace and perseverance and who continues to serve as an example to all her children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren; my wife Terese, who is my biggest supporter and the best mother to our four daughters and Mimi to our two grandsons; and my daughter Elyse, who is now a mother to two sons of her own. I’m also wishing a day of celebration, rest, and love to the hard-working mothers all across our Commonwealth. And to anyone experiencing this day as one of loss or sadness, I hope it will pass gently. Raising children is one of the hardest jobs there is — and we’re not doing enough to support mothers in this country. That is why one of my leading priorities as a U.S. Senator is fighting for our working families: through improving child health and education programs, increasing access to SNAP and other nutrition programs, making child care more affordable, ensuring access to paid family and medical leave, and expanding pregnancy-related and postpartum health care coverage. Our work is far from over, which is why I’m running for re-election to continue championing mothers and our working families. No one will work harder than I will to make sure we aren’t just celebrating moms once a year on Mother’s Day, but instead putting real solutions in place that will help support them every day. With gratitude, Bob Casey = | PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Sara (personal)
subject: A Mother’s Day wish list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230514_em_sjj_mothersday]
Hi friends,
I hope you’re having a great Mother’s Day, however you’re observing and whomever you’re honoring today. I’m incredibly grateful for my own mom, for my sister-in-law, for all my friends who are becoming moms and parenting little ones, and for my colleagues in Congress who are championing policies that uplift kids and families!
Today is about recognizing all the mothers and mother figures in our lives who fight day in and day out for their families. And honoring their strength shouldn’t be a political issue - after all, people on both sides of the aisle are celebrating their loved ones today.
But (you knew there’d be a but)... to be perfectly honest, seeing spring flowers, inspirational quotes, and heartfelt cards can feel pretty hollow when so many of my Republican colleagues are fighting to strip away fundamental rights from moms and women everywhere every other day of the year.
This Mother’s Day, we need to reevaluate the ways we’re honoring mothers and start thinking about truly supporting them in all their decisions, providing resources so that they can live full and equal lives in this country.
We can start by making sure that people can become parents when and how they choose - or if they choose not to become parents, supporting them in those decisions too. Everyone deserves access to reproductive care as well as safe and legal abortion care.
And for those who decide that being a parent is the right choice for them, we need to offer support before, during, and after pregnancy in ways that we are absolutely not doing right now.
I’m talking about critical resources like:
✅ Paid family leave
✅ Quality and affordable child care
✅ A predictable work schedule
✅ Strong public schools
✅ Affordable higher education
✅ Accessible health care, including abortion care
✅ A safe, affordable, place to live and raise a family
✅ Reliable transportation
✅ Access to healthy food, including formula for their little ones
✅ Access to the medication they need, without worrying about shortages or astronomical prices
And SO much more. Without these basic human supports, way too many mothers are forced into lower-paying jobs, or they’re pushed out of the workforce entirely. They are more likely to struggle to provide for their families and face higher rates of poverty.
Mothers are doing the incredibly important and difficult work of raising the next generation - all while my Republican colleagues are making it harder for them every chance they get.
But I’m going to keep fighting - until all moms have the support they need. I'd love to hear your thoughts on all this - feel free to reply directly to this email if you've got anything to share.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: [] Hi friends, I hope you’re having a great Mother’s Day, however you’re observing and whomever you’re honoring today. I’m incredibly grateful for my own mom, for my sister-in-law, for all my friends who are becoming moms and parenting little ones, and for my colleagues in Congress who are championing policies that uplift kids and families! Today is about recognizing all the mothers and mother figures in our lives who fight day in and day out for their families. And honoring their strength shouldn’t be a political issue - after all, people on both sides of the aisle are celebrating their loved ones today. But (you knew there’d be a but)... to be perfectly honest, seeing spring flowers, inspirational quotes, and heartfelt cards can feel pretty hollow when so many of my Republican colleagues are fighting to strip away fundamental rights from moms and women everywhere every other day of the year. This Mother’s Day, we need to reevaluate the ways we’re honoring mothers and start thinking about truly supporting them in all their decisions, providing resources so that they can live full and equal lives in this country. We can start by making sure that people can become parents when and how they choose - or if they choose not to become parents, supporting them in those decisions too. Everyone deserves access to reproductive care as well as safe and legal abortion care. And for those who decide that being a parent is the right choice for them, we need to offer support before, during, and after pregnancy in ways that we are absolutely not doing right now. I’m talking about critical resources like: ✅ Paid family leave ✅ Quality and affordable child care ✅ A predictable work schedule ✅ Strong public schools ✅ Affordable higher education ✅ Accessible health care, including abortion care ✅ A safe, affordable, place to live and raise a family ✅ Reliable transportation ✅ Access to healthy food, including formula for their little ones ✅ Access to the medication they need, without worrying about shortages or astronomical prices And SO much more. Without these basic human supports, way too many mothers are forced into lower-paying jobs, or they’re pushed out of the workforce entirely. They are more likely to struggle to provide for their families and face higher rates of poverty. Mothers are doing the incredibly important and difficult work of raising the next generation - all while my Republican colleagues are making it harder for them every chance they get. But I’m going to keep fighting - until all moms have the support they need. I'd love to hear your thoughts on all this - feel free to reply directly to this email if you've got anything to share. -Sara Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. body:
Peter,
I hate to bother you on a Sunday, so I’ll keep this short.
Our weekly deadline is tonight, but we still haven’t met our goal. I know it may not seem like fundraising matters right now, especially since the 2024 elections are so far away, but the work we do now in these early stages of the election cycle will allow us to build a strong foundation and help us win big next year.
Taking back the House is our top priority as we get ready for the year ahead, but we can’t do it alone.

[**May 14, 1804:** The Corps of Discovery embarked on a remarkable expedition from St. Louis, Missouri, to the Pacific Ocean and back, lasting from May 14, 1804, to September 23, 1806. Led by Lewis and Clark, the group of around 40 men covered nearly 8,000 miles, primarily navigating the Missouri River. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXfzUzwizi9kROAthCb3F8Qlmiep8URCidwfeDxeduGt33W9_wIHfZ3qg9vlJFbjwJuNt0EK70snKbpsPlWd9b246cRNRtOWfEvwVWe9ftr8trjk0TkBqEcYRExeTxPaYXyYGi-EY2PBfusGyw9CUxTj849U3eCdcoc_RO6jAGtDr8xuY9OdQONUgpYafGo8WrqQbthxZdWMgGwTrIt9SiMlAW4gpouC7u60evSroO4BM) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXfzUzwizi9kROAthCb3F8Qlmiep8URCidwfeDxeduGt33W9_wIHfZ3qg9vlJFbjwJuNt0EK70snKbpsPlWd9b25yGLzJdAfeaQDde-69jOWrASS9KUKeX4TFU_GDsQDM9SSPHL1TDNBRqJbUgomuI5hOGcqTmpGV7R3v9_bAuRVP1p2sRaC1WQTyt-622BNw0rFU5yeoKLej_QwKmHNy1kTJ_NTcyQ6j6UKrkkLaILKc)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXcZiMlOzB7WQVi285Lr3Cs-_5N3EEEo0V7ga4nR6YcCZCelyehzul-ybQXsnPWdhv-7nlDf8nn9s8hC4kx2t0ElY4uNHjUNTDAtaWJCsWvR9LlEEC4Fz1Nkm1sZLm1LzYoCp71bFgT1YsSTMLmt9faEpaQ9UscX5Xm2fy7nU2Mu0rxEvaB37HpIdJfURr_SLij27OgFE2D6jl6lO-iClxdbHDkWy6Ck2sErdadoSnCRf)**

[**May 14, 1897:** The Washington Iowa State Theatre (USA) in Washington, Iowa, holds the title of the oldest continuously operating cinema theater. It first opened its doors on May 14, 1897, and has remained in continuous operation for an impressive 124 years and 257 days, as of January 26, 2022.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXUk1MSGSbzEII3R0yJyujgZQfeqVAedZDoRMucoxzSMYQeCfmhH1Y1iZyo_mlyjNtn8_t-wDQNqwULv4GkSWyzcmUZK-kAGbPo34QP9LzTor9GNyGEduMfhURIsn0SAq4Su6oM9oKTBJ5yz1uhlycOwCNoQO_oa2vS0pyFab-x7vjUwonwNBA9MEZZ0IwTFK5lG28JDkgzaqKHwR0ecmchETPaasdnereWGvVuEnFi9mN8M3znXlFZHVcS9sbYohrZRgxW6aKnHJXmb3Pu3b0IHETyOGVtQnqGAuazdvSKSkHVW--JGlIVDjcYz36bknmx-GItaP7Zq-m5FoS0Fdj_jWssQ1QrEwR_xBmfrHnv8fMIrQtLNzM8DZRw2iLdfUxTCr6pp90xzIpb-ud5z-x2Q%3D) **Source -[guinnessworldrecords.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXUk1MSGSbzEII3R0yJyujgZQfeqVAedZDoRMucoxzSMYQeCfmhH1Y1iZyo_mlyjNtn8_t-wDQNqwULv4GkSWyzcmUZK-kAGbPo34QP9LzTor9GNyGEduMfhURIsn0SAq4Su6oM9oKTBJ5yz1uhlycOwCNoQO_oa2vS0pyFab-x7vjUwonwNBA9MEZZ0IwTFK5lG28JDkgzaqKHwR0ecmchETPaasdnereWGvVuEnFi9mN8M3znXlFZHVcS9sbYohrfVNlh-efQzJiY-ZqtupTnZAg6ecJnvi6o2mQtg-q8BChLt7wnXyqs-dGPM0Jl57XWAnSlGA7IdB-JIgv4dx2H6TbVnO7R2arTQdwbFl4YTZb73LIb_iPEmz8szDmmxkFe1x68YpQYsaQ5O8qeKaLQY%3D)**

[**May 14, 1908:** Charlie Furnas, the world's first airline passenger, had the privilege of flying with both Wilbur and Orville Wright at Kitty Hawk, NC. After a short hop with Wilbur earlier in the day, Furnas then embarked on another flight, this time accompanied by Orville. They covered an impressive distance of 4,506 yards in just four minutes and a few seconds.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXYPzLeuFoLnYpaw0lXwEITni-cE7nnWNBK3tk5GXnpCsL_lJ6YjhraAB3hf1Qo_tb0Ki_sCuc36YQ47skZ0Xobk8PRltgRfzHudHEAAkEuRK3dn9mX65TnLaND6VJgtQ7MV5MMdwHsNUAkPCg0N5v39c79CrSNv74TbGOUdE8IwML185pygkU71ZhkCunP17LfnwX38bxQJ29p86ouXG5W4kBWOuhtgd7hZJORTAux7C) **Source -[wrightstories.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e286417ff37d4b6794216ea750a7731e&_e=PUaxc9uqx30TqpVwOkAnXYPzLeuFoLnYpaw0lXwEITni-cE7nnWNBK3tk5GXnpCsL_lJ6YjhraAB3hf1Qo_tb0Ki_sCuc36YQ47skZ0XobnMAOd2sGoHuYjmrqs1l0Fq8LRm2q87g4K7micpAQQytVqWr7mENMJVAsOPk_UJzkDcsGVfoaENlO7DqMmFKKAYRG7OfLyPN_wqRHsHGgAFLywFxnK65adfcNjXzRmwcmCOaRUCMraOlMMzpWVJ5I5E)**

_**But we have some bad news.**_ Donations are far below where they need to be! If we don’t pick up the pace, we won’t have the resources to out-organize the GOP in 2024, and they could flip Georgia back to **RED.**

| Happy Mother's Day!
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,
We all know moms make the world go round. Thank you moms for your enduring sacrificial love and care for your kids and your family. Tracy, Remi, and I are wishing all moms a Happy Mother's Day!
We are looking forward to another great week on the campaign trail. As Governor Glenn Youngkin says, let's "lock arms" so we can win all over the Commonwealth in November!
---

subject: keep Josh in Congress to fight for bipartisan progress

body:
# [#]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount=]

America is 17 days away from defaulting on our loans. Why?

Extremists in Congress have used the debt ceiling as a bargaining chip for their new budget, which would: *
Cut
60,000
teachers,
hurting
25
million
kids;
*
Cut
30
million
Veterans'
health
visits
and
increases
the
disability
claims
backlog
by
130,000;
*
Risk
health
care
for
nearly
21
million
Americans.

These cuts aren’t just unacceptable — they’re dangerous. These cuts would be devastating to millions of vulnerable Americans.

Moments like this are EXACTLY why it is so important to keep Josh in Congress. As a bipartisan problem-solver, Josh is working overtime, reaching across the aisle and trying to find a solution that works for all of us. Can you chip in $ before our mid-month deadline to help us keep him in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount=]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount=]

Let’s be clear: America has NEVER failed to pay our bills. Congress has worked to prevent default 78 times since 1960, including 3 times under Trump.

Tying the debt ceiling to these proposed budget cuts is a slap in the face to the people of our district — it’s a slap in the face to our values.

Josh is an independent fighter. He ran for Congress because he believes that the people of NJ-5 deserve an advocate, someone who will take the fight straight to the special interests and partisans on both sides. He’s in this for you.

Help us keep Josh fighting to find a bipartisan solution to the debt ceiling — before it’s too late. Chip in $ or any amount now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2305?amount=]

Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. Peter,

We don’t want to take too much of your time on a Sunday, so here’s what you need to know:
1. Republicans named Seth to their list of top targets ahead of 2024. That means they’re getting ready to spend big here in Rhode Island to try and flip this seat in Congress.

body:
Did you see Jasmine’s note, Peter? We’re still falling short of the $5,000 we need to close our mid-month fundraising gap, and **our deadline is tomorrow at midnight!**
---
With time running out, we had to reach out to make sure our most engaged supporters got the chance to give. Your name was at the top of our list, Peter, so we’re counting on you to come through today.
Will you chip in $5 to Emerge now – or as much as you can – to help hit our $5,000 goal and empower Democratic women to run for office and win in every state? Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/emerge2023](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63292141/406266024/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkOTUzODE1LTlkZjItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=INK5x7w4wQuNC7qdKYo619sAqGQuHNwyY2Lbalcwr74=)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jasmine Smith (Emerge)**
Date: Sat, May 13, 2023
Subject: we don’t have much time to catch up, Peter
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63292142/406266025/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkOTUzODE1LTlkZjItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=INK5x7w4wQuNC7qdKYo619sAqGQuHNwyY2Lbalcwr74=)

Peter, Democratic women are counting on Emerge for the training and support they need to run for office and fight the GOP’s agenda. We rely on community members like you to power this crucial work, but donations this month have been _seriously slowing down. _** **
**Here’s what I saw when I pulled our fundraising report today: **
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63292143/406266026/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkOTUzODE1LTlkZjItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=INK5x7w4wQuNC7qdKYo619sAqGQuHNwyY2Lbalcwr74=)
**It’s not looking good, Peter. ****Emerge MUST raise $5,000 by Monday, May 15, to get back on track and empower Democratic women to lead – but we can’t do it without you. We know that you’re as committed to this fight as we are, so please: **
**[Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge now to help close our fundraising gap before our crucial mid-month deadline? Every dollar helps recruit and train bold Democratic women to run for office and keep fighting for our rights in every state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63292144/406266027/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkOTUzODE1LTlkZjItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=INK5x7w4wQuNC7qdKYo619sAqGQuHNwyY2Lbalcwr74=)**

Dedicated supporters like you are the reason we can help strong Democratic women overcome obstacles on the campaign trail and in office. These women are fighting to**** defend access to lifesaving health care, lower costs for working families, and turn our country around. We need to have their backs while they fight to take care of our communities**.

But any fundraising shortfall has big consequences in our work to transform politics. ****So please, Peter: **

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: fighting back against attack ads by organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Our Revolution, Bernie, and AOC are going
all-out to elect Helen Gym, and billionaires are fighting back with
everything they have – spending their unlimited resources to run attack
ads designed to confuse voters into voting against their own interest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1009&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]That’s why we need your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to
help close our $5,429 budget gap so we can do voter outreach to our 40,000
progressive super-voters in Philadelphia?

—Begin Forwarded Message—

Peter Willis,

With Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders’
endorsed candidate for the Mayor of Philadelphia within striking distance
of victory, Pennsylvania’s wealthiest man is flooding the airwaves with
attack ads in a desperate attempt to stop Helen Gym from winning.

We expected nothing less. This is what happens when a real progressive
with a background as a teacher and a union organizer gets close to winning
in a city historically controlled by a corrupt political machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1010&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]Our Revolution has 40,000 progressive super-voters in Philly that we’re
targeting for voter outreach — and in a race this close, every dollar will
matter. Please donate here to help us close our $10,421 budget gap and
fund voter turnout in the final days!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8600?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1011&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8601?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1012&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8602?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1013&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8603?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1014&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8604?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1015&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1016&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

All of the forces holding cities around the country from serving their
citizens, including police unions, public school privatizers, real estate
developers, and the billionaire class — are pouring everything they have
into stopping Helen from winning, and we need your help to fight back in
the final days.

Just like we saw in Chicago, where progressives won big, this election is
a battle between big money that wants to stop change and grassroots
organizing.

If we all stand together and double down on person-to-person voter
turnout, we’re going to win here, just like in Chicago. That’s why our
work is so critical.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly&t=1017&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]Can we count on you to pitch in now to help us get out the vote in
Philadelphia?

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly.pkzq4D&t=1001&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly.KlHHkd&t=1002&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly.pb9iIm&t=1003&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230514_FR_Philly_0_6MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Philly.Z5kHf8&t=1004&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=4275%2E5885482%2EGRTJl9 ][IMG]

that we only send you the most relevant organizing opportunities.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Stop Roundup from harming endangered monarchs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1771589?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | A vibrant orange and black creature with beautifully patterned wings flutters gracefully through the springtime air. It is a monarch butterfly who has just completed her epic migration journey back north. She’s exhaustively searching for milkweed -- a vital plant that is the only place where she can lay her eggs and will also serve as the only food source for baby caterpillars once her offspring hatch. _**But where has all the milkweed gone?**_ Over the last two decades, some **850 million milkweed plants** have vanished. A key reason why the North American monarch population has **dropped by an alarming _90%._ ** Scientists have linked the dramatic decline in milkweed to a toxic chemical called glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup. But while this dangerous pesticide is DECIMATING milkweed and THREATENING precious monarchs, the pesticide corporation has continued to push sales of its flagship product -- even _**manipulating science**_ and _**obstructing regulations**_ to**_COVER UP the truth of Roundup’s harms!_ ** [**Friend, will you let Bayer-Monsanto continue with its dangerous lies that are putting endangered monarch butterflies at risk of extinction? Or will you demand accountability and take action right now?** ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1771590?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1771591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s a simple truth, Friend. If glyphosate continues to wipe out milkweed plants, _**endangered monarchs may NOT survive.**_ And it isn’t just these beloved pollinators that suffer the negative effects of this toxic pesticide.
**Glyphosate has been linked to cancer, reproductive harm, and other serious health risks in humans -- with children being the most vulnerable to exposure! **
But despite KNOWING these dangers, Bayer-Monsanto STILL willingly continues _**putting people, pollinators, and our planet at risk.**_ The powerful Big Ag giant has spent millions of dollars trying to hide how **UNSAFE** Roundup really is -- _but YOU know the truth, Friend._
**That’s why we’re counting on 6,307 more environmentalists like you to speak up before 11:59 P.M. tonight. [TAKE ACTION NOW: Demand that Bayer-Monsanto STOPS selling toxic Roundup immediately! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1771592?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1771591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for fighting back!
Friends of the Earth**

During her first term in Congress, I have seen Hillary fight for West Michigan just as strongly as she fights for our family – and believe me, that’s saying something! The boys and I miss her now that she’s spending more time in Washington advocating for our communities, but we couldn’t be more proud of the work she’s doing.

This is Hillary’s first Mother’s Day as a member of Congress, so we want to make it extra special. clean_body: This is Hillary’s first Mother’s Day as a member of Congress, so we want to make it extra special. | = | Hi there – I’m Jesse, Hillary’s husband (and biggest supporter!). Hillary exceeds expectations in every role she fills – from lawyer to life partner to Congresswoman. But above all, she is an incomparable mom to our two sons, James and Wesley. = | = | = During her first term in Congress, I have seen Hillary fight for West Michigan just as strongly as she fights for our family – and believe me, that’s saying something! The boys and I miss her now that she’s spending more time in Washington advocating for our communities, but we couldn’t be more proud of the work she’s doing. This is Hillary’s first Mother’s Day as a member of Congress, so we want to make it extra special. = | = | = Thank you so much for celebrating with us, Jesse = * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: The weird George Santos connection to the California U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek, this week, Republican George Santos turned himself in
after the Department of Justice indicted him on 13 criminal charges.

The charges include wire fraud, money laundering, and lying to Congress.
And it’s no surprise that Kevin McCarthy is sticking by him. After all,
Republicans have just a 4-seat House majority, and McCarthy is the weakest
Speaker in modern history.

But there’s a connection to Adam’s Senate campaign in California that we
just can’t ignore.

George Santos’ campaign treasurer is leading a new Republican Super PAC
called — get this — STOP ADAM PAC.

We have no idea where much of Santos’ campaign cash comes from or who is
paying his multi-hundred thousand dollar bail. And we have no idea whether
that money will start pouring in to stop Adam from winning this election
to the Senate.

So we need to prepare. Right now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]Can you chip in $10 or any amount to Adam’s campaign so that we’re
prepared to face the attacks from George Santos’ campaign operatives and
their new shady Super PAC? Adam isn’t taking corporate PAC money, so your
support is essential to helping us fight back.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=may2023_abs_em.VrKnFM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

There’s simply no telling what we can expect. But Kevin McCarthy has vowed
that Adam can “never” become California’s U.S. Senator, and as he remains
by Santos’ side, we have to be prepared for everything.

Thanks for everything you’re doing to support Adam and the rest of our
team,

— Schiff HQ

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2023_abs_em.FKV_Cj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2224%2E5257348%2EDh-GmA ]DONATE MONTHLY

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=283cb55c2a144464b300e5df74c51bda&_e=2ljB8DUWn1OXHKfOIrFAf6ZZYm8yh8qZmnlfzF_P_KBNe5-puruq88feN1HRLV69qwmYSH1QX4fqE44ipU0_lDz7O0L8PzylFYK1Y7Yxtrst3CT1TVyVUOIJ77jTYGxH_bY-bDUxVgjUQMJXePwJJM5NKilw-dCLyCiKMxuPSUvmGqA2BxJwn0T7jniLTHr2MWq5BrvOuzLnd457FqHuylPPQl10GuicsFxXaVxyAip8t7x3h55NRkxhnXXQf7HXA-2rUpc5ZK_j1CbtRk8H4dJqQ7sf_ah34Zbyy2G4Kg3ba8OCQDpvu27JsQHCxYvgpayvcqPxZrbM1if6aTqbtWApDnHXW7F2chJXuJdjbTo%3D)
---
Peter, “**Non sibi sed patriae**.” It’s a Latin saying we have in the Navy, and it means “**not self but country**.”

As a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line every day executing missions and performing deep dives in the most dangerous corners of the world.

I didn’t do any of it for fame or glory - I did it for the country that I owe my life to.

Now that my combat career is over, my missions look a lot different, but I still live by the same motto, and now, I’m calling on YOU to put our nation’s future first.

**I’m on a mission to UNLEASH American potential, and we have a $5K deadline TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT to do it.**

_**Just a few dollars could make all the difference, Peter. Your small act of selflessness could change the course of our great country.**_

[**Please, pitch in before TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT so we can meet our $5K mid-month deadline and UNLEASH American potential!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=283cb55c2a144464b300e5df74c51bda&_e=2ljB8DUWn1OXHKfOIrFAf6ZZYm8yh8qZmnlfzF_P_KBNe5-puruq88feN1HRLV69qwmYSH1QX4fqE44ipU0_lDz7O0L8PzylFYK1Y7Yxtrst3CT1TVyVUOIJ77jTYGxH_bY-bDUxVgjUQMJXePwJJM5NKilw-dCLyCiKMxuPSUvmGqA2BxJwn0T7jniLTHr2MWq5BrvOuzLnd457FqHuyshNlUcsJk7zWGMdp6cC7YJofW7Qpfbw7nwjdq_gD5oTyY6e3oUwh1fIBcRGmqTRJnaEzsnQzndsik5EHCDrzyjcWhiqndOBxF3XOZVe14ANcw0Ymm0UgIGTZzlGyNpByqWykFfwWO6n6gZREUU9qBw%3D)

Serving as a Navy Special Operations Officer, I had to make a lot of sacrifices. Whether it was time away from my family or missing the comforts of home, there’s a lot I missed out on.

**But I wouldn’t trade my experience defending the greatest nation on Earth for anything.**

My family escaped a kill list in communist Vietnam to come to America, Peter. If it wasn’t for our nation’s freedoms, I may not be here today - and I’ll NEVER take those freedoms for granted.

_**That’s why when I see Democrats encroaching on our liberties today, I’m absolutely _furious._**_

**I’ll do whatever it takes to stop the Left from eroding our freedom, but I can’t do it alone. I need YOU on my team, and with just a few dollars, you can UNLEASH America from the chains of the socialist Democrats.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, “Non sibi sed patriae.” It’s a Latin saying we have in the Navy, and it means “not self but country.” As a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line every day executing missions and performing deep dives in the most dangerous corners of the world. I didn’t do any of it for fame or glory - I did it for the country that I owe my life to. Now that my combat career is over, my missions look a lot different, but I still live by the same motto, and now, I’m calling on YOU to put our nation’s future first. I’m on a mission to UNLEASH American potential, and we have a $5K deadline TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT to do it. Just a few dollars could make all the difference, Peter. Your small act of selflessness could change the course of our great country. Serving as a Navy Special Operations Officer, I had to make a lot of sacrifices. Whether it was time away from my family or missing the comforts of home, there’s a lot I missed out on. But I wouldn’t trade my experience defending the greatest nation on Earth for anything. My family escaped a kill list in communist Vietnam to come to America, Peter. If it wasn’t for our nation’s freedoms, I may not be here today - and I’ll NEVER take those freedoms for granted. That’s why when I see Democrats encroaching on our liberties today, I’m absolutely furious. I’ll do whatever it takes to stop the Left from eroding our freedom, but I can’t do it alone. I need YOU on my team, and with just a few dollars, you can UNLEASH America from the chains of the socialist Democrats. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. We’re no longer two parties who simply have different political opinions: we now have the party of socialism and the party of freedom, and right now, EVERY American has to make a choice. We have a deadline to defeat the socialist Democrats and I need every single patriot on our team to step up. This mid-month goal is CRITICAL to our victory, and I’m counting on you. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Our Republican opponent Jeff Landry received an endorsement from Donald Trump last week, which means we must act fast and raise $4,655 to reach our Fightback Fund goal before Monday at midnight.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Some distressing numbers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it’s Chuck. The team showed me some distressing numbers just now.

As we always expected, the Republicans are starting off strong. The election experts at FiveThirtyEight say winning in 2024 will be _even tougher_ for us than it was in 2022. Early polls show statistically TIED races in multiple states, and right now the donations we need to pull Democrats ahead have NOT picked up as much as we need them to.

**I’m sorry to say our window of opportunity to take an early advantage is closing. The situation is so critical that I've just authorized an _extremely rare_ TRIPLE-Impact Match to help close the fundraising gap before [tomorrow's](https://go.dscc.org/go/13650?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10770%2E9716520%2EZar__N) mid-month deadline.**

**[Please, I’m personally asking you to make a matched $5 donation today to help protect our Democratic Senate majority. This is one of the most consequential elections in our lifetimes, and your gift will have TRIPLE the impact until our _crucial_ fundraising deadline tomorrow night. >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/13650?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10770%2E9716520%2EZar__N)**

The good news is, meeting our $125,000 mid-month goal would improve our position by leaps and bounds -- but it's going to take a team effort.

It is _vital_ that we meet our goal. If we fall short, the next set of polls I review will almost certainly be worse.

President Biden and all of our Senate candidates are counting on this grassroots team, so I hope you'll help make a difference [today.](https://go.dscc.org/go/13650?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10770%2E9716520%2EZar__N) _**Don't let this rare Triple-Impact Match expire before we OFFICIALLY reach this must-hit goal!**_

**[Please, I’m counting on you -- step up today with a TRIPLED donation of $5 or more to defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority:](https://go.dscc.org/go/13650?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10770%2E9716520%2EZar__N)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED:

| | [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/13650?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230514-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10770%2E9716520%2EZar__N)

Chuck Schumer
